legalSystem.en: The legal system was a mixture of Islamic court law, customary practice, landlord adjudication, and administrative decree, increasingly influenced by British legal and procedural notions in matters of property, policing, and judicial process

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以土地税为核心，辅以关卡税、市税、专卖及罚没收入；税收多经包税或地主中介征解，导致中间盘剥严重
taxationSystem.en: Finance rested primarily on land revenue, supplemented by transit duties, market taxes, monopolies, and confiscations; collection often passed through tax farmers or landlord intermediaries, causing heavy exactions

religion.zh: 统治阶层以什叶派伊斯兰为主，但国家社会具有强烈多元性，逊尼派穆斯林、印度教徒及其他社群共同构成阿瓦德文化世界
religion.en: The ruling elite was predominantly Shia Muslim, but the kingdom was strongly plural in character, with Sunni Muslims, Hindus, and other communities all forming part of Awadh's cultural world

philosophy.zh: 宫廷思想结合波斯化伊斯兰政治文化、什叶派宗教学术、印度次大陆礼仪传统与乌尔都文学审美，强调风雅、忠诚、庇护与等级秩序
philosophy.en: Courtly thought combined Persianate Islamic political culture, Shia scholarship, subcontinental traditions of etiquette, and the aesthetics of Urdu literature, emphasizing refinement, loyalty, patronage, and hierarchical order

writingSystem.zh: 行政和文学主要使用波斯文与乌尔都文，书写多用波斯-阿拉伯字母纳斯塔利克体；印地语与地方语言亦广泛口语使用
writingSystem.en: Administration and literature chiefly used Persian and Urdu, generally written in the Perso-Arabic Nastaliq script; Hindi and regional vernaculars were also widely spoken

culturalAchievements.zh: 勒克瑙在诗歌、音乐、舞蹈、礼仪、服饰、美食、建筑和宗教纪念仪式方面享有盛名；宫廷赞助下的乌尔都诗歌、马尔西亚挽歌、卡塔克舞和精致城市生活构成其最鲜明文化标志
culturalAchievements.en: Lucknow was celebrated for poetry, music, dance, etiquette, dress, cuisine, architecture, and religious commemorative ritual; court patronage of Urdu poetry, marsiya elegy, Kathak dance, and refined urban life formed its most distinctive cultural signature

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属于印度-伊朗语系中的印度-雅利安语支，宫廷文化强烈受伊朗语族波斯语影响
languageFamily.en: The principal spoken languages belonged to the Indo-Aryan branch of the Indo-Iranian family, while court culture was strongly shaped by Persian, an Iranian language

gdpDescription.zh: 阿瓦德经济在北印度属富庶农业型经济，人口稠密、耕地广阔、手工业与城市消费旺盛，但国家财政效率低下，且经济结构 increasingly 依附于英国控制下的更大区域市场
gdpDescription.en: Awadh's economy was a prosperous agrarian economy by North Indian standards, with dense population, broad cultivation, active handicrafts, and strong urban consumption, but state finances were inefficient and the economic structure was increasingly subordinated to the larger British-dominated regional market

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食种植、甘蔗、靛蓝、棉纺与织造、刺绣、金银工艺、皮革、香料加工、宫廷奢侈品制作和建筑营造
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, sugarcane, indigo, cotton spinning and weaving, embroidery, gold and silver craftsmanship, leatherwork, spice processing, court luxury production, and construction

tradeGoods.zh: 稻米、小麦、糖、酥油、靛蓝、棉布、丝织品、刺绣品、鸦片、马匹、金属器、香料与工艺奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, wheat, sugar, ghee, indigo, cotton cloth, silk textiles, embroidered goods, opium, horses, metalware, spices, and artisanal luxury products

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距极大，城市宫廷相关阶层拥有可观珠宝、土地收益与现金流，普通农户多仅有耕具、牲畜与少量储粮，容易因歉收和催税陷入债务
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: urban court-connected strata held significant jewelry, land income, and cash flow, while ordinary cultivators often possessed only tools, livestock, and modest grain reserves and could fall into debt after poor harvests or harsh collection

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地租和土地税为核心的前工业王国经济，辅以城市市场、手工业和受英国势力影响的区域贸易网络
economicSystem.en: A preindustrial kingdom economy centered on agrarian rent and land revenue, supplemented by urban markets, handicrafts, and regional trade networks shaped by British power

category.zh: 对英相关条约负担与债务
category.en: Treaty-related obligations and debts tied to the British

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库仍具一定现金与贵金属储备，但已被长期高额宫廷支出、行政低效、外部压力与条约负担侵蚀，财政韧性明显下降
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury still held a meaningful reserve of cash and bullion, but it had been eroded by prolonged court expenditure, administrative inefficiency, external pressure, and treaty burdens, leaving the state with declining fiscal resilience

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向维持宫廷威望和短期收支周转，依赖强化征收与地方中介，不足以完成制度改革或建立稳健现代预算体系
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored maintaining court prestige and short-term liquidity, relying on intensified extraction and local intermediaries rather than undertaking institutional reform or creating a sound modern budgetary system

description.zh: 以常备步兵和地方征募部队为主，训练与装备不均，部分采用火绳枪和燧发枪，战斗力逊于公司军
description.en: Comprised mainly of standing infantry and locally recruited forces, unevenly trained and equipped, with some matchlocks and flintlocks; inferior in effectiveness to Company forces

description.zh: 保留北印度传统骑兵与贵族随从特色，适于巡逻、威慑和地方作战，但难以对抗纪律严整的近代化军队
description.en: Retained the character of North Indian traditional cavalry and noble retainers, useful for patrol, intimidation, and local warfare, but not well suited against disciplined modernized armies

description.zh: 拥有一定数量野战炮与守城炮，但维护、编制与火炮操练普遍落后，难以形成持续火力优势
description.en: Maintained a number of field and fortress guns, but maintenance, organization, and gunnery drill were generally backward, limiting sustained firepower effectiveness

description.zh: 负责都城、行宫、库藏和重要城镇治安，政治象征意义强于野战价值
description.en: Responsible for the capital, palaces, treasury, and security in key towns; politically symbolic more than field-effective

commanderInChief.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里·沙阿名义上为最高统帅，实际军务由宫廷大臣与各部将领分掌，并受英国监督
commanderInChief.en: Muhammad Ali Shah was nominally commander-in-chief, while practical military affairs were handled by court ministers and branch commanders under British oversight

technology.zh: 军备总体处于晚期火药时代与早期近代军制之间，主要依赖旧式火枪、骑兵传统和有限炮兵，缺乏与英国同步的训练、后勤和工业基础
technology.en: Military technology stood between the late gunpowder age and early modern military systems, relying on older firearms, cavalry traditions, and limited artillery, without the training, logistics, or industrial base of the British

threats.zh: 最大威胁并非外敌入侵，而是英国东印度公司以治理不善为由进一步干涉、裁军或吞并；此外还有地方豪强不稳、边境摩擦和财政导致的军纪败坏
threats.en: The greatest threat was not foreign invasion but further intervention, disarmament, or annexation by the British East India Company under the pretext of misgovernment; other dangers included unstable magnates, border friction, and declining discipline caused by fiscal weakness

populationDescription.zh: 阿瓦德人口稠密，是恒河平原最富庶地区之一；居民以农村农业人口为主，宗教和语言结构多元，勒克瑙则以宫廷、商业和手工业人口集中著称
populationDescription.en: Awadh was densely populated and among the more prosperous regions of the Gangetic plain; the population was predominantly rural and agrarian, religiously and linguistically diverse, while Lucknow was notable for its concentration of court, commercial, and artisanal populations

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、贵族、塔鲁克达尔与高级文官；中层包括军官、乌理玛、卡亚斯特与商人、手工业行会；下层则是小农、佃户、农业雇工、城市劳工与家内仆役
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal family, nobles, taluqdars, and senior officials; the middle layers included officers, ulama, Kayasth clerks, merchants, and artisan guilds; the lower strata were made up of small peasants, tenants, agricultural laborers, urban workers, and household servants

allies.zh: 无真正自主盟友；最重要的对外关系是与英国东印度公司的从属合作关系
allies.en: No truly autonomous allies; the most important external relationship was the subordinate cooperative one with the British East India Company

enemies.zh: 名义上无明确公开敌国，但英国东印度公司实际上是其主权最主要的侵蚀者；同时与地方不服从势力和财政受损的地主集团存在持续紧张
enemies.en: Nominally it had no openly declared enemy state, but the British East India Company was in practice the chief eroder of its sovereignty; there were also persistent tensions with disobedient local powerholders and fiscally aggrieved landlord groups

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持王位、避免被直接吞并、向英国展示忠顺并争取有限内政空间为核心，几乎没有独立区域外交能力
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving the throne, avoiding direct annexation, demonstrating loyalty to the British, and retaining limited internal autonomy; it possessed almost no independent regional diplomatic capacity

era.zh: 工业革命时代下的前工业南亚宫廷国家
era.en: A preindustrial South Asian courtly state in the age of the Industrial Revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 其技术特征主要在精细手工业、城市建筑、纺织、金属工艺、火器仿制与灌溉农业方面；近代工业、铁路、电报和机器化制造尚未成为王国自身能力的一部分
keyInnovations.en: Its main technical strengths lay in fine handicrafts, urban building, textiles, metalwork, imitation firearms production, and irrigated agriculture; modern industry, railways, telegraphy, and mechanized manufacturing were not yet part of the kingdom's own capabilities

strengths.zh: 农业资源丰富，人口众多，勒克瑙文化与消费市场繁荣，王室仍具合法性与象征威望，地方社会有深厚地主和宗教网络支撑
strengths.en: It possessed rich agricultural resources, a large population, a flourishing cultural and consumption center in Lucknow, continuing royal legitimacy and symbolic prestige, and dense local support networks among landlords and religious institutions

weaknesses.zh: 政治主权受限，财政失衡，行政效率低，军队落后，地方控制力不足，宫廷奢靡形象与英国干涉相互强化，削弱了国家自救能力
weaknesses.en: Its sovereignty was constrained, finances were imbalanced, administration inefficient, the military backward, and local control incomplete; the image of courtly extravagance combined with British interference to weaken the state's capacity for self-preservation

outlook.zh: 1840年的阿瓦德仍维持富庶与华丽外观，但结构性衰落明显；若无深刻财政、军政和地方治理改革，其未来极可能进一步沦为英国直接控制对象
outlook.en: In 1840 Awadh still maintained an appearance of wealth and splendor, but its structural decline was clear; without deep fiscal, military-administrative, and local governance reforms, it was highly likely to fall under more direct British control

description.zh: 名义独立但深受英国支配的北印度王国，以宫廷文化闻名。
description.en: A nominally independent North Indian kingdom heavily subordinated to British influence and famed for courtly culture.

name.en: East India Company Rule in India

governmentForm.zh: 由英国东印度公司代表英国王室与议会统治的特许公司殖民政体，兼具公司寡头统治、总督集权与地方藩属安排
governmentForm.en: A chartered company colonial polity ruled by the British East India Company on behalf of the British Crown and Parliament, combining corporate oligarchy, governor-general centralization, and subordinate princely arrangements

socialStructure.zh: 社会由英国公司官员与欧洲商人、印度土邦统治者与地主、城市商人和放债者、文书与中间阶层、手工业者、农民、佃户、部族社群及受雇军人构成，并叠加复杂的种姓、宗教、地区与语言差异
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of British Company officials and European merchants, Indian princely rulers and landed elites, urban merchants and moneylenders, clerks and intermediary strata, artisans, peasants, tenants, tribal communities, and salaried soldiers, overlaid by complex caste, religious, regional, and linguistic divisions

rulingClass.zh: 东印度公司董事会、加尔各答总督及其参事会、总统辖区高级文武官员，以及与公司合作的土邦君主、札明达尔与大地主精英
rulingClass.en: The East India Company's Court of Directors, the Governor-General in Calcutta and his council, senior civil and military officers in the presidencies, and cooperating princely rulers, zamindars, and large landed elites

succession.zh: 最高主权由英国王位世袭；印度行政首脑由英国政府与东印度公司任命的总督继任，不实行本地王朝世袭统治
succession.en: Ultimate sovereignty followed hereditary succession of the British throne; the chief executive in India was the Governor-General appointed through the British state and East India Company, rather than by local dynastic succession

structure.zh: 1840年的统治核心为加尔各答的印度总督及其参事会，下辖孟加拉、马德拉斯与孟买三大总统辖区，并通过省级专员、地区行政官、征收官、司法官与驻土邦政治代表管理广阔领土；伦敦的董事会与控制委员会对总体政策保有决定性影响
structure.en: In 1840 the governing core was the Governor-General of India in Calcutta with his council, above the three major presidencies of Bengal, Madras, and Bombay, and below them a wide hierarchy of provincial commissioners, district magistrates, collectors, judges, and political agents in princely states; in London, the Court of Directors and Board of Control retained decisive influence over overall policy

function.zh: 统筹最高行政命令、立法、条约、政治通信与跨总统辖区协调
function.en: Coordinated supreme executive orders, legislation, treaties, political correspondence, and inter-presidency administration

function.zh: 负责地税评估、盐税、关税、垄断收入、预算编制与地方财政征解
function.en: Handled land revenue assessment, salt tax, customs, monopoly income, budget formation, and provincial fiscal collection

function.zh: 管理最高法院体系、巡回法庭、地区法院、法规整理与刑事民事审判
function.en: Managed supreme and circuit courts, district courts, legal codification, and criminal and civil adjudication

function.zh: 负责欧籍与土著军队编制、军需、驻防、边境作战与军官任命事务
function.en: Oversaw European and native army organization, supply, garrisoning, frontier warfare, and officer appointments

function.zh: 处理与土邦、阿富汗、尼泊尔、锡克政权及周边国家的外交、驻节与附庸安排
function.en: Handled diplomacy, residencies, and subordinate arrangements with princely states, Afghanistan, Nepal, Sikh power, and neighboring polities

function.zh: 管理对外贸易征税、盐务专卖及鸦片生产销售体系
function.en: Administered external trade duties, the salt monopoly, and the opium production and sales system

function.zh: 负责道路、运河、军用工事、仓库、驿递与有限港口设施维护
function.en: Maintained roads, canals, military works, warehouses, postal relays, and limited port facilities

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以总统辖区、省、专区和县区为层级，关键地方官为兼具司法与警务权的区长兼征收官；在孟加拉保留永久地税制下的札明达尔体系，在马德拉斯和孟买更多采用直接向耕作者或村社征税的莱特瓦里与马哈尔瓦里安排；大量土邦则由本地王公治理并受公司驻节监督
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized through presidencies, provinces, divisions, and districts, with the key district officer serving as collector-magistrate with fiscal, judicial, and police authority; Bengal retained the Permanent Settlement zamindari framework, while Madras and Bombay more often used ryotwari and mahalwari arrangements taxing cultivators or village bodies directly; many princely states remained under indigenous rulers supervised by Company residents

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为英国殖民法、公司规章、条例法、英式程序与印度教、伊斯兰个人法的混合体；刑事与行政权高度集中于公司官员，欧洲人与印度臣民在司法适用上并不完全平等
legalSystem.en: The legal system was a hybrid of British colonial law, Company regulations, statutory enactments, English procedures, and Hindu and Islamic personal law; criminal and administrative powers were highly concentrated in Company officials, and Europeans and Indian subjects were not fully equal before the law

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以土地收入为核心，并辅以盐税、鸦片专卖收益、海关税、印花与司法收费、阿卡里酒税及若干垄断收入；税负对农村社会压力沉重，征收常以现金完成，增强了农民对市场和放贷者的依赖
taxationSystem.en: The fiscal system centered on land revenue, supplemented by salt taxation, opium monopoly income, customs duties, stamp and court fees, abkari excise, and other monopoly receipts; the burden on rural society was heavy, and collection was often monetized, increasing peasant dependence on markets and moneylenders

religion.zh: 宗教构成极为多元，以印度教和伊斯兰教为主，另有锡克教、耆那教、佛教残存群体、祆教徒、犹太社群及逐渐扩张的基督教传教网络；公司官方在名义上较为务实谨慎，但欧洲传教、教育改革与宗教干预议题日益敏感
religion.en: Religion was highly diverse, dominated by Hinduism and Islam, with Sikhism, Jainism, residual Buddhist communities, Zoroastrians, Jewish groups, and a gradually expanding Christian missionary network; the Company remained officially cautious and pragmatic in principle, but missionary activity, educational reform, and religious interference were increasingly sensitive issues

philosophy.zh: 思想世界并存梵学、伊斯兰法学与苏非传统、锡克宗教思想、地方伦理观念，以及受英国统治推动而发展的功利主义行政观、东方学研究和早期印度社会改革思潮
philosophy.en: The intellectual world combined Sanskritic learning, Islamic jurisprudence and Sufi traditions, Sikh religious thought, local ethical systems, and, under British rule, utilitarian administrative ideas, Orientalist scholarship, and early Indian currents of social reform

writingSystem.zh: 书写体系高度多样，行政高层 increasingly使用英语，传统文书与印刷则广泛采用波斯文、阿拉伯文、天城文、孟加拉文、古木基文、泰米尔文、泰卢固文、卡纳达文、马拉雅拉姆文、古吉拉特文等多种文字
writingSystem.en: Writing systems were highly diverse: higher administration increasingly used English, while traditional documentation and print culture widely employed Persian, Arabic, Devanagari, Bengali, Gurmukhi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati, and many other scripts

culturalAchievements.zh: 1840年前后的文化成就包括加尔各答、马德拉斯和孟买的印刷出版兴起，印度语言报刊扩张，梵文、波斯文与阿拉伯文经典编辑翻译，英印建筑样式的发展，以及在教育与社会改革领域出现的新型公共讨论空间
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural achievements around 1840 included the rise of printing and publishing in Calcutta, Madras, and Bombay, expansion of Indian-language newspapers, editing and translation of Sanskrit, Persian, and Arabic classics, development of Indo-British architectural forms, and new spaces of public debate in education and social reform

languageFamily.zh: 语言谱系复杂，主要包括印欧语系的印度-雅利安诸语、达罗毗荼语系诸语，以及藏缅、蒙达和其他区域语言；英语在上层行政与商业中影响迅速上升
languageFamily.en: The linguistic landscape was complex, chiefly including Indo-European Indo-Aryan languages, Dravidian languages, as well as Tibeto-Burman, Munda, and other regional tongues; English was rising rapidly in upper administration and commerce

gdpDescription.zh: 公司印度是全球最大的大型农业经济区之一，拥有庞大人口、成熟的稻米、小麦、棉花与靛蓝生产体系，以及加尔各答、孟买、马德拉斯等海港带动的出口网络。经济总量极高，但人均产出偏低，地区间差异显著，且财富分配深受殖民征税、地租与贸易结构影响。
gdpDescription.en: Company India was one of the world's largest agrarian economic regions, with a vast population, mature production of rice, wheat, cotton, and indigo, and export networks driven by ports such as Calcutta, Bombay, and Madras. Aggregate output was very high, but per capita productivity remained low, regional disparities were marked, and wealth distribution was strongly shaped by colonial taxation, rents, and trade structures.

mainIndustries.zh: 主要产业为农业、棉纺与手工织造、靛蓝种植、鸦片生产、盐务、糖、丝绸、皮革、造船、金属手工业、内河与海运贸易及金融放贷
mainIndustries.en: Main industries included agriculture, cotton spinning and handloom weaving, indigo cultivation, opium production, salt, sugar, silk, leather, shipbuilding, metal crafts, inland and maritime trade, and finance and moneylending

tradeGoods.zh: 主要贸易品包括原棉、棉布、丝绸、靛蓝、鸦片、盐硝、大米、小麦、糖、皮革、香料、染料、毛织品输入、金属制品输入与英国工业纺织品输入
tradeGoods.en: Major trade goods included raw cotton, cotton textiles, silk, indigo, opium, saltpeter, rice, wheat, sugar, leather, spices, dyestuffs, imported woolens, imported metal goods, and imported British manufactured textiles

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。城市商人、放贷者、承包商、地主与部分土邦贵族可积累大量白银、土地、珠宝和债权；绝大多数农户仅拥有有限耕畜、农具与房舍，常因歉收、税负和债务而脆弱。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Urban merchants, moneylenders, contractors, landlords, and some princely aristocrats could accumulate large stocks of silver, land, jewelry, and debt claims; the vast majority of rural households held only limited livestock, tools, and dwellings and were vulnerable to crop failure, taxes, and indebtedness.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制为殖民重商主义与市场交换并存的混合模式：农业生产多由村社、佃农与地主体系组织，出口贸易和高利润商品受公司制度、特许、关税与金融网络强烈塑造；同时，自由贸易原则正在逐步取代早期公司垄断。
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a hybrid of colonial mercantilism and market exchange: agricultural production was organized largely through village communities, tenants, and landlord systems, while export trade and high-profit commodities were strongly shaped by Company institutions, privileges, tariffs, and financial networks; at the same time, free-trade principles were gradually displacing earlier Company monopolies.

source.zh: 消费税、印花税与司法收费

source.en: Tributes from princely states, post, and miscellaneous

category.zh: 外交、土邦驻节与边境事务
category.en: Diplomacy, princely residencies, and frontier affairs

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库由加尔各答、孟买、马德拉斯及若干主要军政中心的现金储备、可流通票据和对银行与承包商的债权组成。由于战争、边境行动和汇兑需求频繁，账面储备虽可观，但流动性常受运输、季风和国际贸易支付压力制约。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of cash reserves, negotiable paper, and claims on banks and contractors held at Calcutta, Bombay, Madras, and major military-administrative centers. Because of warfare, frontier operations, and remittance demands, the nominal reserve was substantial, but liquidity was often constrained by transport, monsoon conditions, and international payment pressures.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调稳定地税、保障军费和维持信用，同时通过盐与鸦片等高收益项目弥补行政成本。整体取向偏向汲取型殖民财政，优先满足边疆扩张、治安和对英国本土与海外贸易网络的资金需求。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized stable land revenue, assured military funding, and preservation of credit, while relying on high-yield items such as salt and opium to cover administrative costs. Its overall character was extractive colonial finance, prioritizing frontier expansion, internal order, and the funding needs of British metropolitan and overseas trade networks.

description.zh: 规模最大的总统辖区军队，以土著步兵、骑兵和炮兵为主，并配属欧洲军官与少量英军部队，主要负责北印度与西北边境行动。
description.en: The largest presidency army, composed mainly of sepoy infantry, cavalry, and artillery under European officers with some British units attached, chiefly responsible for northern India and the northwestern frontier.

description.zh: 负责南印度驻防与内部秩序，兵员较稳定，远征能力次于孟加拉军。
description.en: Responsible for garrisoning southern India and maintaining internal order, with relatively stable manpower and less expeditionary capability than the Bengal Army.

description.zh: 部署于西印度与阿拉伯海沿岸，兼顾对信德、古吉拉特和海上通道的警备。
description.en: Stationed in western India and along the Arabian Sea littoral, guarding Sindh, Gujarat, and maritime routes.

description.zh: 包括驻印英军团与公司欧洲兵，火力、训练和政治可靠性高，是关键攻坚与镇压力量。
description.en: Included British regiments in India and Company European troops, with superior firepower, training, and perceived political reliability, serving as the main striking and suppression force.

description.zh: 掌管重炮、攻城、测绘、筑堡、军械库和补给运输，是公司军事优势的重要支柱。
description.en: Managed heavy guns, siege warfare, surveying, fortification, arsenals, and supply transport, forming a major pillar of Company military superiority.

commanderInChief.zh: 休·高夫爵士

technology.zh: 军队处于火绳枪向燧发枪和击发枪过渡后的成熟火器时代，拥有强大的野战炮兵、攻城炮、军械库、测绘与工兵体系，后勤依赖驮运、河运与海运。相较周边多数亚洲政权，公司军队在训练、炮兵组织、军官制度与战略机动上占优，但仍未进入铁路与电报全面军事化阶段。
technology.en: The army stood in the mature age of firearms after the transition from matchlocks to flintlocks and percussion arms, with strong field artillery, siege guns, arsenals, surveying, and engineering systems, while logistics depended on pack transport, river movement, and shipping. Compared with most neighboring Asian polities, Company forces held advantages in training, artillery organization, officer systems, and strategic mobility, though they had not yet entered the fully railway-and-telegraph militarized stage.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西北方向的阿富汗局势、旁遮普锡克帝国的军力、信德与边境部族抵抗，以及新并吞地区可能发生的地方叛乱和兵员不满；海上则需防范法俄等欧洲列强在印度洋与中亚方向的战略竞争。
threats.en: Principal threats came from the Afghan situation in the northwest, the military power of the Sikh Empire of Punjab, resistance in Sindh and among frontier tribes, and possible local rebellions or sepoy discontent in newly annexed territories; at sea, French and Russian strategic competition in the Indian Ocean and Central Asia also required attention.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约九千万，主要分布于恒河平原、孟加拉三角洲、德干高原边缘与沿海农业区。人口密度在孟加拉和北印度极高，部分森林、山地与边境地带相对稀疏。高出生率与高死亡率并存，区域性饥荒、疫病和战争仍会显著影响人口结构。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 90 million, concentrated in the Gangetic plain, Bengal delta, margins of the Deccan plateau, and coastal agricultural zones. Density was especially high in Bengal and northern India, while some forest, upland, and frontier regions were relatively sparse. High birth rates coexisted with high mortality, and regional famine, disease, and warfare still significantly shaped demographic patterns.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括公司与英籍官员、欧亚混血与城市专业群体、土邦贵族、札明达尔与地主、商人银行家、宗教与学术精英、军官与土著军人、手工业者、城市贫民、佃农、小农、无地劳工和部族社群。种姓、宗教、地区与是否受公司直接统治深刻影响阶层流动。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included Company and British officials, Eurasians and urban professionals, princely nobles, zamindars and landlords, merchants and bankers, religious and scholarly elites, officers and sepoys, artisans, the urban poor, tenants, smallholders, landless laborers, and tribal communities. Caste, religion, region, and whether one lived under direct Company rule profoundly shaped social mobility.

allies.zh: 主要盟友和附属伙伴包括英国本土政府、若干受保护土邦如海得拉巴、部分拉杰普特邦、尼泊尔在有限合作层面，以及阿拉伯海与孟加拉湾若干受公司影响的港口政权。
allies.en: Principal allies and subordinate partners included the British metropolitan government, several protected princely states such as Hyderabad, some Rajput states, Nepal in limited cooperation, and certain port polities in the Arabian Sea and Bay of Bengal under Company influence.

enemies.zh: 1840年的主要对手为阿富汗诸势力、对公司扩张保持警惕或敌对的锡克帝国、信德地方统治者与边疆部族；在全球层面，俄罗斯帝国被视为潜在战略竞争者。
enemies.en: The main adversaries in 1840 were Afghan forces, the Sikh Empire which remained wary of or hostile to Company expansion, rulers in Sindh, and frontier tribal groups; at the global level, the Russian Empire was regarded as a potential strategic rival.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以确保印度边疆安全、扩大缓冲地带、控制海上通道、压制潜在欧陆竞争者影响并稳步推进附属同盟体系为核心。公司在名义上尊重土邦，但实际通过驻节、补助条约、军事干预和财政控制不断扩大宗主权。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on securing India’s frontiers, expanding buffer zones, controlling maritime routes, suppressing the influence of possible continental European rivals, and steadily enlarging the system of subsidiary alliances. The Company nominally respected princely states, but in practice expanded suzerainty through residents, subsidy treaties, military intervention, and fiscal control.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术特点包括蒸汽航运开始在印度洋和主要河道发挥作用，现代兵工厂与标准化火器供应逐步完善，测绘、三角测量和印刷技术高度发展，港口、道路和运河基础设施有所扩展；但铁路、电报和大规模机械化工厂尚处于引入前夜或极早阶段。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological features included the growing use of steam navigation in the Indian Ocean and major rivers, gradual improvement of modern arsenals and standardized firearms supply, advanced surveying, triangulation, and printing, and some expansion of ports, roads, and canal infrastructure; however, railways, telegraphs, and large-scale mechanized factories were still on the eve of introduction or in a very early stage.

strengths.zh: 公司印度的优势在于庞大人口与税基、肥沃农业区、成熟贸易港口、相对高效的殖民官僚体系、强大的炮兵与常备军，以及与英国全球海军和金融体系相连接的战略后盾。
strengths.en: Company India’s strengths lay in its vast population and tax base, fertile agrarian regions, developed trading ports, relatively efficient colonial bureaucracy, powerful artillery and standing forces, and strategic backing from Britain’s global naval and financial system.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点包括统治合法性脆弱、行政层级薄弱而过度依赖少数外籍官员、农村税负沉重、地区社会差异巨大、对土著士兵忠诚与地方中介阶层合作的依赖，以及易受边疆战争、财政紧张与贸易波动影响。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included fragile legitimacy, a thin administrative layer overly dependent on a small number of foreign officials, heavy rural taxation, enormous regional social diversity, reliance on sepoy loyalty and cooperation from local intermediaries, and vulnerability to frontier wars, fiscal strain, and trade fluctuations.

outlook.zh: 1840年的前景总体强劲且继续扩张，但也暗藏风险。若能在西北边疆维持优势并继续整合财政与交通网络，公司统治将在短期内进一步扩大；然而，土邦不满、军队结构性矛盾、宗教文化敏感和殖民汲取加深，正在为未来更大规模的政治危机积累条件。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1840 was broadly strong and expansionary, but not without latent danger. If the Company could maintain superiority on the northwestern frontier and continue integrating fiscal and transport networks, its rule would likely expand further in the short term; yet princely resentment, structural tensions within the army, religious and cultural sensitivities, and deepening colonial extraction were already creating the conditions for future large-scale political crisis.

description.zh: 由东印度公司代表英国统治的广大印度领地，正向北印、西印和东印扩展。
description.en: Vast Indian territories ruled by the East India Company on Britain's behalf, expanding across northern, western, and eastern India.

governmentForm.zh: 以锡克君主制为核心的军事-封建帝国，中央宫廷与行省总督并存，1840年因兰吉特·辛格去世而陷入摄政、宫廷派系与军队势力争夺
governmentForm.en: A Sikh-centered military-feudal empire combining a central court with provincial governorships; in 1840 it was destabilized by regency politics, court factions, and army struggles following the death of Ranjit Singh.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室与贵族、锡克军队、地主与贾吉尔领有者、城市商人和工匠、乡村农民以及穆斯林、印度教徒、锡克教徒等多宗教社群构成；国家统治虽由锡克王权主导，但在行政与财政上依赖跨宗教精英合作
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the royal house and nobility, the Sikh army, landholders and jagirdars, urban merchants and artisans, rural peasants, and multi-religious communities including Muslims, Hindus, and Sikhs; while rule was led by Sikh kingship, administration and finance depended on cooperation among elites of different faiths.

rulingClass.zh: 苏克查基亚王室、桑达瓦利亚与多格拉等宫廷家族、高级军官、重要贾吉尔领主以及掌管财政与文书事务的文官精英
rulingClass.en: The Sukerchakia royal family, courtly houses such as the Sandhawalias and Dogras, senior military commanders, major jagirdars, and civil elites managing finance and record-keeping.

succession.zh: 王位原则上实行世袭，由苏克查基亚王朝男性继承人承继；但1840年因王位更替频繁、摄政与宫廷阴谋而极不稳定
succession.en: The throne was in principle hereditary within the male line of the Sukerchakia dynasty; however, in 1840 succession was highly unstable due to repeated royal deaths, regency politics, and court intrigue.

structure.zh: 帝国由拉合尔中央朝廷统辖，以大君名义集权，但实际权力分散于王后阵营、王族派系、首席大臣、军队将领和地方总督之间。重要边疆地区如克什米尔、白沙瓦、木尔坦和哈扎拉由总督或军政长官管理，中央通过财政征收、驻军和人事任命维系统治。
structure.en: The empire was formally centralized under the Lahore court in the Maharaja's name, but real power was divided among the queen's faction, royal kinsmen, chief ministers, army commanders, and provincial governors. Key frontier regions such as Kashmir, Peshawar, Multan, and Hazara were administered by governors or military-administrative chiefs, with the center maintaining control through revenue extraction, garrisons, and appointments.

name.en: Royal Court and Chief Minister's Office

function.zh: 处理诏令、宫廷政务、王室财产、摄政协调和高级官员任命
function.en: Managed decrees, court affairs, royal estates, regency coordination, and appointments of high officials.

function.zh: 征收土地税、监管贾吉尔、管理国库、审计地方贡赋与关税收入
function.en: Collected land revenue, supervised jagirs, managed the treasury, and audited provincial tribute and customs receipts.

function.zh: 管理常备军、火炮、军饷、军需、边防驻军和军官名册
function.en: Administered the standing army, artillery, pay, supplies, frontier garrisons, and officer rolls.

function.zh: 负责与英国东印度公司、阿富汗诸势力、西藏及中亚边疆的外交、情报与边境事务
function.en: Handled diplomacy, intelligence, and border affairs with the East India Company, Afghan powers, Tibet, and the Central Asian frontier.

function.zh: 维持城市治安、审理重大案件、协调宗教法与习惯法实践
function.en: Maintained urban order, heard major cases, and coordinated religious and customary legal practice.

function.zh: 维护道路、渡口、运河、兵工厂、火炮铸造与堡垒修缮
function.en: Maintained roads, ferries, canals, arsenals, artillery foundries, and fortification repair.

function.zh: 保存波斯文、旁遮普文和其他行政文书，起草敕令、地契和财政档案
function.en: Preserved Persian, Punjabi, and other administrative records, drafting edicts, land grants, and fiscal archives.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以行省、地区和村社三级为主。省级由纳齐姆、总督或军事长官统辖；地区由卡尔达尔等税务与行政官员管理；村社则依赖地方地主、村长和宗教社群领袖。帝国在边疆地区更偏重军事化治理，在富庶平原地区则依赖税收官僚与地方中介。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated broadly through provinces, districts, and village communities. Provinces were governed by nazims, governors, or military chiefs; districts by kardars and other revenue-administrative officers; villages relied on local landholders, headmen, and communal leaders. Frontier areas were ruled more militarily, while the prosperous plains depended more on revenue bureaucracy and local intermediaries.

legalSystem.zh: 法律制度呈多元并行状态。中央裁断依王命、行政先例和国家利益；民事与家庭事务常依伊斯兰法、印度教惯例、锡克传统及地方习惯处理。刑事司法较为严厉，但较少采用莫卧儿式繁复法典化程序，实际执行深受地方官与军政需要影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was plural and pragmatic. Central judgments rested on royal authority, administrative precedent, and state interest; civil and family matters were often handled through Islamic law, Hindu custom, Sikh tradition, and local practice. Criminal justice could be severe, but was less formally codified than late Mughal procedure, and actual enforcement was shaped heavily by local officials and military necessity.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入以土地税为主，辅以关税、盐税、过境费、手工业与城市市场征收。部分地区直接由官员征收，部分则通过贾吉尔、包税或地方中介取得。税率因土地产量、灌溉条件和政治安全而异，边疆军事地区常兼有贡赋与军粮征集。
taxationSystem.en: State income relied chiefly on land revenue, supplemented by customs, salt duties, transit fees, and levies on crafts and urban markets. Some areas were collected directly by officials, while others were assigned through jagirs, tax farming, or local intermediaries. Rates varied according to fertility, irrigation, and political security, and frontier military zones also furnished tribute and requisitioned grain.

religion.zh: 帝国以锡克教王权为核心，但整体宗教结构高度多元，穆斯林在人口中占重要比例，印度教徒在商贸和文书阶层中势力显著。王室长期资助锡克圣地，同时也延续对清真寺、苏菲圣陵和印度教寺庙的某种保护与施舍传统。
religion.en: The empire was centered on Sikh kingship, but its religious makeup was highly diverse, with Muslims forming a major share of the population and Hindus prominent in commerce and scribal service. The court patronized Sikh sacred centers while also maintaining traditions of protection and almsgiving toward mosques, Sufi shrines, and Hindu temples.

philosophy.zh: 政治思想以锡克君权、武士荣誉、实用治国和边疆帝国意识相结合；行政文化深受晚期莫卧儿波斯化官僚传统影响，同时旁遮普地方习俗与宗教伦理在基层治理中持续发挥作用。
philosophy.en: Political thought combined Sikh kingship, martial honor, practical statecraft, and a frontier-imperial outlook. Administrative culture remained deeply shaped by late Mughal Persianate bureaucratic traditions, while Punjabi custom and religious ethics continued to influence local governance.

writingSystem.zh: 行政上仍广泛使用波斯文书写体系；锡克宗教与部分旁遮普文记录多用古木基文；商业和部分印度教社群亦使用兰达等商用文字传统。
writingSystem.en: Persian script remained widely used for administration; Sikh religious and some Punjabi records were commonly written in Gurmukhi; mercantile and some Hindu communities also employed Landa and related commercial scripts.

culturalAchievements.zh: 兰吉特·辛格时代留下了显著的建筑、军制和宫廷艺术遗产，包括拉合尔宫廷文化、阿姆利则及周边宗教建筑修缮、金属工艺、兵工制造、细密画传统以及融合旁遮普、波斯和中亚风格的宫廷审美。1840年虽政治不稳，但这些文化成果仍具持续影响。
culturalAchievements.en: The age of Ranjit Singh left notable legacies in architecture, military organization, and courtly arts, including Lahore court culture, repairs and patronage of Amritsar and other religious sites, metalwork, ordnance manufacture, miniature painting, and a court aesthetic blending Punjabi, Persian, and Central Asian styles. Though politically unstable in 1840, these achievements remained influential.

languageFamily.zh: 主要通行语言属印欧语系印度-伊朗语族，包含旁遮普语、波斯语、克什米尔语、普什图语及多种地方方言；行政和外交语言高度波斯化
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Iranian family, including Punjabi, Persian, Kashmiri, Pashto, and various local dialects; administrative and diplomatic language remained strongly Persianized.

gdpDescription.zh: 帝国经济以高产农业、灌溉平原、区域贸易和军事国家需求为基础，在南亚西北部属于较强政权。其经济规模不及英国东印度公司控制的印度广大区域，但在人口仅约四百万的国家中已属可观。宫廷内乱与军队争权开始削弱财政效率。
gdpDescription.en: The imperial economy rested on productive agriculture, irrigated plains, regional trade, and the demands of a military state, making it one of the stronger polities in northwestern South Asia. Its scale did not rival the vast territories controlled by Company India, but for a state of only about four million people it was substantial. Court disorder and army factionalism were beginning to reduce fiscal efficiency.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、小麦与大麦种植、棉花、甘蔗、畜牧、纺织、金属加工、火炮与枪械制造、马匹贸易、木材与皮革加工、地毯和手工艺品
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, wheat and barley cultivation, cotton, sugarcane, animal husbandry, textiles, metalworking, artillery and firearms manufacture, horse trade, timber and leather processing, carpets, and handicrafts.

tradeGoods.zh: 粮食、棉布、羊毛制品、盐、马匹、木材、金属器、军械、克什米尔制品、染料、糖、皮革及中亚输入的奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Grain, cotton cloth, woolens, salt, horses, timber, metal goods, military stores, Kashmiri products, dyes, sugar, leather, and luxury goods arriving from Central Asia.

name.zh: 旁遮普卢比与纳纳克沙希铸币体系
name.en: Punjab Rupee and Nanakshahi coin system

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富多以土地使用权、牲畜、谷物储备、首饰和银币形式保存。富裕地主和商人持有灌溉土地、借贷债权、商路网络与贵金属储藏。国家长期战争和王室赏赐使财富分布高度不均。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was commonly held in land-use rights, livestock, grain stores, jewelry, and silver coin. Wealthier landholders and merchants controlled irrigated land, credit claims, trade connections, and bullion reserves. Long militarization and royal patronage made wealth distribution highly unequal.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导的农业财政经济，夹杂封地分配、地方征收、城市商贸和军需工业。中央并不实行现代资本主义管理，但积极利用市场、军工厂和跨区域贸易网络为军事国家服务。
economicSystem.en: A state-directed agrarian-fiscal economy combining jagir assignments, local revenue extraction, urban commerce, and military industry. The center did not operate under modern capitalist management, but it actively used markets, arsenals, and interregional trade networks to sustain a military state.

source.en: Customs, Transit Duties, and Market Taxes

source.zh: 国营工坊、盐税及杂项收入
source.en: State Workshops, Salt Duties, and Miscellaneous Receipts

category.zh: 地方驻防、边疆防务与堡垒
category.en: Provincial Garrisons, Frontier Defense, and Fortifications

category.zh: 宫廷、王室赏赐与贵族津贴
category.en: Court, Royal Patronage, and Noble Allowances

category.zh: 工务、宗教施舍与其他支出
category.en: Public Works, Religious Endowments, and Other Spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 拉合尔国库在兰吉特·辛格晚年仍较充实，积累了银币、贵金属、珠宝、战利品和王室储藏，但1840年已因继承危机、宫廷开支和军队索饷而面临迅速消耗。账面财富可观，实际可自由调度部分却在缩小。
treasuryDescription.en: The Lahore treasury remained fairly substantial from the later years of Ranjit Singh, holding coin, bullion, jewels, war booty, and royal reserves, but by 1840 it was being rapidly strained by the succession crisis, court spending, and army demands for pay. The nominal wealth of the treasury was impressive, while the portion freely disposable by the state was shrinking.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策仍以维持军队忠诚、确保土地税征解和稳住边疆为核心。政府倾向于短期动用库藏、延缓支付、重新分配封地和加重部分地方征收，而非进行系统制度改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on maintaining army loyalty, ensuring land revenue collection, and holding the frontiers. The government tended to rely on drawing down reserves, delaying payments, reallocating jagirs, and intensifying local extraction rather than undertaking systematic institutional reform.

description.zh: 包括按欧洲操典训练的正规营和传统步兵，是兰吉特·辛格军制改革的核心组成部分，装备燧发枪与刺刀，战斗力在印度诸邦中较强。
description.en: Included regular battalions drilled on European lines alongside traditional infantry, forming a core part of Ranjit Singh's military reforms; armed with flintlocks and bayonets, they were among the stronger infantry forces in the Indian subcontinent.

description.zh: 既有精锐不正规骑兵，也有部分正规骑兵团，适合快速机动、追击和边疆作战，在旁遮普与西北边境环境中极具威慑力。
description.en: Consisted of elite irregular horsemen as well as some regular cavalry regiments, suited to rapid movement, pursuit, and frontier warfare, and highly formidable in Punjab and the northwest frontier environment.

description.zh: 炮兵是帝国军力最著名的部分，拥有野战炮、重炮和攻城火炮，并配套兵工厂和铸炮体系；其技术与组织水平在南亚非欧洲国家中较为突出。
description.en: Artillery was the most famous arm of the empire, including field guns, heavy guns, and siege artillery, supported by arsenals and foundries; its technical and organizational level was notable among non-European powers in South Asia.

description.zh: 分布于白沙瓦、克什米尔、木尔坦及其他要地，负责守城、巡防、征收与镇压叛乱，战斗力参差不齐但对维持帝国统治不可或缺。
description.en: Stationed in Peshawar, Kashmir, Multan, and other strategic areas, these forces handled fort defense, patrol, revenue enforcement, and suppression of unrest; their quality varied but they were indispensable to imperial control.

commanderInChief.zh: 大君名义统帅，实权分散于拉合尔宫廷、首席大臣及各军将领
commanderInChief.en: The Maharaja was the nominal commander-in-chief, but real authority was fragmented among the Lahore court, chief ministers, and senior generals.

technology.zh: 军队装备以燧发枪、滑膛炮、火药兵工和欧洲化操练为主。兰吉特·辛格时期曾雇用欧洲军官训练正规军和炮兵，形成南亚少有的较现代化军制；但1840年指挥体系受政治混乱严重削弱。
technology.en: The army's equipment centered on flintlock muskets, smoothbore artillery, gunpowder arsenals, and European-style drill. Under Ranjit Singh, European officers had trained regular infantry and artillery, producing one of the more modernized military systems in South Asia; by 1840, however, political turmoil was badly undermining command cohesion.

threats.zh: 最大威胁来自内部而非外部：宫廷政变、军队独立化、王位争夺及多格拉、桑达瓦利亚等派系冲突。对外则需防范英国东印度公司的持续观察与未来干涉、西北阿富汗边疆不稳以及边地部族反抗。
threats.en: The greatest threats were internal rather than external: court coups, increasing military autonomy, succession struggles, and factional conflict among groups such as the Dogras and Sandhawalias. Externally, the empire had to watch the East India Company's growing scrutiny and future intervention, instability on the Afghan frontier, and resistance from tribal borderlands.

populationDescription.zh: 帝国人口约四百万，主体分布在旁遮普平原，也包括克什米尔、木尔坦、白沙瓦等不同地理与族群区域。人口以农村农业居民为绝大多数，宗教与语言结构复杂多样。
populationDescription.en: The empire's population was about four million, concentrated mainly in the Punjab plain but also including regions such as Kashmir, Multan, and Peshawar with differing geography and ethnic composition. The overwhelming majority were rural agricultural inhabitants, and the religious and linguistic makeup was highly diverse.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、贵族、军官、大地主和大商人；中层包括文书、地方官、神职人员、手工业主和中小商人；下层主要是佃农、自耕农、牧民、城市工匠和劳工。宗教身份、土地占有和军职机会共同塑造社会地位。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal family, nobles, officers, large landholders, and major merchants; the middle layers included scribes, local officials, clergy, master artisans, and middling traders; the lower strata were primarily tenants, peasant proprietors, pastoralists, urban craftsmen, and laborers. Religious identity, landholding, and access to military service all shaped social status.

allies.zh: 1840年几乎无稳固正式盟友。与英国东印度公司维持谨慎条约关系与边界和平，但这更接近相互戒备而非真正同盟；对部分山地与边疆势力则有宗主或附庸关系。
allies.en: In 1840 the empire had few firm formal allies. It maintained a cautious treaty relationship and border peace with the East India Company, but this was closer to mutual suspicion than genuine alliance; with some hill and frontier powers it exercised suzerainty or tributary influence.

enemies.zh: 公开敌对关系有限，但长期安全对手包括阿富汗边疆势力和潜在扩张中的英国东印度公司。更迫切的敌人是内部派系：王族竞争者、宫廷阴谋集团与逐渐政治化的军队。
enemies.en: Open foreign hostility was limited, but long-term security rivals included Afghan frontier forces and the expansionist East India Company. More immediate enemies were internal factions: rival royal claimants, court intrigue groups, and an increasingly politicized army.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以守成为主：维持与英国的条约平衡，保持西北边境缓冲，尽量避免在王位危机期间卷入大规模对外战争。国家已从兰吉特·辛格时期的扩张姿态转向谨慎防御和宫廷自保。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was primarily conservative: preserve the treaty balance with the British, maintain a buffer on the northwestern frontier, and avoid major external war during the succession crisis. The state had shifted from the expansionism of Ranjit Singh's era to cautious defense and courtly self-preservation.

keyInnovations.zh: 虽未工业化，但在南亚属于较先进军事技术国家之一。关键能力包括欧洲式步兵操典、近代炮兵体系、地方兵工厂、金属铸造、火药制造、攻城与堡垒工程、灌溉农业技术以及跨区域行政文书制度。
keyInnovations.en: Though not industrialized, it was among the more advanced military-technical states in South Asia. Key capabilities included European-style infantry drill, a relatively modern artillery system, local arsenals, metal casting, gunpowder production, siege and fortification engineering, irrigated agriculture techniques, and interregional administrative record systems.

strengths.zh: 帝国拥有坚实的农业税基、训练有素且火力较强的军队、拉合尔与阿姆利则等富庶城市、较高的跨宗教行政整合能力，以及控制南亚西北门户的重要战略位置。
strengths.en: The empire possessed a solid agrarian tax base, a well-trained and relatively firepower-heavy army, wealthy cities such as Lahore and Amritsar, considerable ability to integrate elites across religious lines, and a strategic position controlling the northwestern gateway of South Asia.

weaknesses.zh: 最大弱点是统治核心崩解：兰吉特·辛格去世后缺乏稳定继承，宫廷派系互斗，军队薪饷压力巨大并开始干政，地方总督与贵族各怀私心。制度高度依赖强人统治，缺少稳固的继承与官僚约束机制。
weaknesses.en: Its greatest weakness was the disintegration of the ruling center: after Ranjit Singh's death there was no stable succession, court factions fought each other, army pay pressures encouraged political intervention, and provincial governors and nobles pursued their own agendas. The system had relied heavily on personal rule and lacked durable mechanisms for succession and bureaucratic restraint.

outlook.zh: 1840年的前景明显转坏。若无法迅速建立稳定摄政、控制军队并整合财政，旁遮普帝国将从区域强权转入内耗，并为英国东印度公司的未来干预创造条件。短期仍具强大军事实力，长期却面临严重政权危机。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1840 was clearly deteriorating. Unless a stable regency were quickly established, the army brought under control, and the finances reorganized, the Punjab Empire would shift from a regional great power into internal decay, creating conditions for future intervention by the East India Company. In the short term it still possessed formidable military strength, but in the long term it faced a grave regime crisis.

description.zh: 兰季特·辛格死后陷入宫廷与军队权力斗争的旁遮普强国。
description.en: A powerful Punjabi state thrown into court and army struggles after the death of Ranjit Singh.

ruler.zh: 阿萨夫·贾六世（名义设定）

governmentForm.zh: 印度土邦式君主制，在英属印度宗主监督下保有内政自治
governmentForm.en: Princely monarchy retaining internal autonomy under the paramountcy and supervision of British India

socialStructure.zh: 社会由宫廷贵族、穆斯林军政精英、印度教与穆斯林地主、城市商人、文书阶层、手工业者与广大农村佃农和农民组成；宗教与语言多元，德干地区的穆斯林宫廷文化与泰卢固、马拉地、卡纳达和达赫尼乌尔都社群并存。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of court nobility, Muslim military-administrative elites, Hindu and Muslim landed magnates, urban merchants, scribal groups, artisans, and a vast rural population of peasants and tenants; the polity was religiously and linguistically diverse, combining Deccani Muslim court culture with Telugu, Marathi, Kannada, and Dakhni Urdu-speaking communities.

rulingClass.zh: 以尼扎姆家族、佩加贵族、宫廷大臣、地方塔卢克达尔与贾吉尔领主为核心的世袭与任命并存的统治集团
rulingClass.en: A ruling stratum centered on the Nizam’s family, Paigah nobles, court ministers, local taluqdars, and jagirdar landholders, combining hereditary privilege with appointed office

succession.zh: 王朝世袭，以男性宗支继承为常规，但常受宫廷派系与英国承认影响
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession, normally through the male line, though often shaped by court factions and British recognition

structure.zh: 国家政务由尼扎姆统领，核心通过迪万主持的中央文官机构、宫廷秘书处、财政系统、司法与军务系统运作；英国驻海得拉巴代表对对外关系、军务安排和继承问题具有显著影响。
structure.en: The state was headed by the Nizam, with governance conducted through a central civil administration led by the Diwan, a court secretariat, fiscal machinery, judicial offices, and military departments; the British Resident at Hyderabad exercised strong influence over external relations, military arrangements, and succession matters.

function.zh: 统筹国家政务、起草诏令、协调财政与地方行政
function.en: Coordinated state administration, drafted orders, and linked the fiscal and provincial systems

function.zh: 管理土地收入、关税、垄断收入与岁入核算
function.en: Managed land revenue, customs, monopoly income, and annual accounting

function.zh: 处理伊斯兰法庭、习惯法庭与民刑案件的审理和复核
function.en: Handled adjudication and review in Islamic courts, customary courts, and civil-criminal cases

function.zh: 管理王室部队、地方兵额、军饷与装备
function.en: Oversaw state troops, provincial levies, pay, and equipment

function.zh: 处理宫廷礼仪、与英国驻扎机构往来及附属贵族事务
function.en: Managed court protocol, dealings with the British establishment, and relations with subordinate nobles

name.zh: 公共工程与铸币工坊监督处
name.en: Public Works and Mint Supervision Office

function.zh: 维护道路、水利、宫殿设施及铸币监督
function.en: Maintained roads, waterworks, palace infrastructure, and supervised minting

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由苏巴、地区、塔卢卡与村社层级构成，许多地区通过贾吉尔和封地间接管理；中央对直属领地控制较强，对贵族封地则依赖协商、审计和驻员监督。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provinces, districts, talukas, and village communities, with many areas indirectly governed through jagirs and landed grants; the center exercised stronger control in crown lands, while noble estates were managed through negotiation, audit, and appointed supervision.

legalSystem.zh: 法律秩序呈混合性质：伊斯兰法适用于部分宗教与家族事务，地方习惯法和印度教法在乡村社会保有影响，刑政与财政方面则由国家诏令和行政惯例主导；英国影响使程序与文书化有所增强。
legalSystem.en: The legal order was mixed: Islamic law applied in some religious and family matters, customary law and Hindu law retained influence in rural society, while criminal and fiscal administration were governed largely by state decrees and administrative practice; British influence encouraged greater procedure and record-keeping.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以土地税为主，辅以关卡税、市场税、盐与若干专卖收益、铸币收益及附庸贡纳；实际征收常通过包税、地方官和地主中介完成，税负因地区与土地性质差异较大。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was based chiefly on land revenue, supplemented by transit duties, market dues, salt and certain monopoly receipts, mint income, and tribute-like payments from subordinate estates; actual collection often relied on tax farming, local officials, and landed intermediaries, with burdens varying widely by region and tenure.

religion.zh: 国家宫廷文化以伊斯兰教逊尼派和德干穆斯林传统为中心，但绝大多数臣民为印度教徒；什叶、苏菲、印度教各派及耆那教等亦有存在，宗教共存是社会常态。
religion.en: Court culture was centered on Sunni Islam and Deccani Muslim traditions, while the majority of subjects were Hindu; Shi'a, Sufi, diverse Hindu traditions, and smaller Jain communities were also present, making religious coexistence a normal feature of society.

philosophy.zh: 思想生活体现波斯化宫廷政治伦理、伊斯兰法学、苏菲敬虔、印度教地方学术传统以及实用官僚治理观念的结合。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life reflected a combination of Perso-Islamic courtly political ethics, Islamic jurisprudence, Sufi piety, regional Hindu scholarly traditions, and practical bureaucratic statecraft.

writingSystem.zh: 官方与宫廷常用波斯文和乌尔都文书写，地方社会广泛使用泰卢固文、马拉地文和卡纳达文；行政文书逐渐增加标准化抄录。
writingSystem.en: Persian and Urdu were commonly used for court and official writing, while Telugu, Marathi, and Kannada scripts were widespread in local society; administrative writing increasingly relied on standardized documentary forms.

culturalAchievements.zh: 海得拉巴以德干-波斯风格宫廷文化、诗歌、书法、建筑、金属工艺、纺织与珠宝闻名；城市延续库特布沙希与阿萨夫贾时期的建筑遗产，形成南亚重要的伊斯兰-德干都市文化中心。
culturalAchievements.en: Hyderabad was known for its Deccani-Persian court culture, poetry, calligraphy, architecture, metalwork, textiles, and jewelry; the city preserved Qutb Shahi and Asaf Jahi architectural legacies, making it one of South Asia’s major centers of Islamic-Deccani urban culture.

languageFamily.zh: 以印欧语系的达赫尼乌尔都语、马拉地语和波斯语行政传统为上层核心，同时有德拉威语系的泰卢固语与卡纳达语广大使用群体
languageFamily.en: At the elite level the state was shaped by Indo-European Dakhni Urdu, Marathi, and Persian administrative traditions, while large populations spoke Dravidian languages such as Telugu and Kannada

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年前后的海得拉巴是一个以农业为主、兼具手工业与区域贸易的大型内陆王国经济体。其总量在南亚土邦中名列前茅，但人均产出仍主要停留在前工业水平，城市经济依赖纺织、军需、奢侈品和行政消费。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1840, Hyderabad was a large inland kingdom whose economy was predominantly agrarian but also supported by handicrafts and regional trade. Its aggregate output ranked among the largest princely states in South Asia, though per-capita production remained largely pre-industrial, with urban activity driven by textiles, military supply, luxury goods, and administrative consumption.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉花种植、谷物生产、牲畜饲养、手工纺织、丝绸与染织、金属加工、武器制造、珠宝工艺、皮革、盐及地方市场贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton cultivation, grain production, livestock raising, handloom textiles, silk and dyed cloth, metalworking, arms manufacture, jewelry crafts, leather, salt, and regional market trade

tradeGoods.zh: 棉布、原棉、丝织品、靛蓝、皮革、谷物、马匹、金银饰品、金属器、木材及部分盐和香料转运品
tradeGoods.en: Cotton cloth, raw cotton, silk goods, indigo, leather, grain, horses, gold and silver ornaments, metalware, timber, and some salt and spice transit goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。贵族和大地主以土地、税收权、珠宝和贵金属储藏为主；城市商人持有货币、库存和债权；普通农户财富多表现为牲畜、农具、粮食储备和有限银饰。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Nobles and large landholders held land rights, revenue assignments, jewels, and precious-metal stores; urban merchants held cash, inventories, and credit claims; ordinary peasants owned mainly livestock, tools, grain reserves, and limited silver ornaments.

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度属传统农业财政国家与区域市场经济的结合体。土地收入是国家基础，手工业依赖行会、商人网络和宫廷订单；对外贸易虽受英国统治体系与沿海港口控制影响，但内部市场仍具相当活力。
economicSystem.en: The economic system combined a traditional agrarian fiscal state with a regional market economy. Land revenue formed the state's base, while handicrafts depended on guild-like practices, merchant networks, and court demand; external trade was influenced by the British-controlled imperial framework and coastal ports, but internal markets remained fairly active.

source.en: Payments from jagirs and subordinate estates

category.en: Court, noble stipends, and ceremonial spending

category.zh: 向英国承担的补助与相关义务
category.en: Subsidiary obligations and related payments to the British

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库由现金、银币储备、部分金饰与王室贵重物构成，流动性受岁入波动、贵族欠款、军费与对英义务影响。整体财政在1840年可称稳定，但长期结构性压力仍存在。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted of cash, silver coin reserves, some gold valuables, and royal precious objects, with liquidity affected by fluctuations in annual revenue, arrears from nobles, military costs, and obligations to the British. By 1840 the fiscal position could be called stable, though long-term structural pressures remained.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，以维持宫廷秩序、按时发军饷和保证对英关系为优先，避免激烈改革；当出现赤字压力时，通常依靠加紧征收、延期支付、借款和重整税契。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was conservative, prioritizing court stability, regular military pay, and the maintenance of relations with the British while avoiding radical reform; when deficits threatened, the state usually responded through stricter collection, payment delays, borrowing, and revision of revenue contracts.

description.zh: 包括正规营、地方守备队和封臣提供的步兵，装备火绳枪、燧发枪及冷兵器，训练与纪律水平差异较大。
description.en: Included regular battalions, local garrisons, and infantry supplied by feudatories, armed with matchlocks, flintlocks, and edged weapons, with uneven standards of training and discipline.

description.zh: 骑兵仍是德干军事传统的重要部分，用于巡逻、威慑、快速机动和镇压地方骚乱，但面对现代化军队时优势下降。
description.en: Cavalry remained a major element of Deccan military tradition, used for patrol, intimidation, rapid movement, and suppression of local unrest, though its effectiveness against more modern armies was declining.

description.zh: 拥有城防和野战火炮，但数量、维护和训练受财政与技术条件限制，现代化程度不及英军体系。
description.en: The state maintained fortress and field artillery, but quantity, maintenance, and training were constrained by fiscal and technical limitations, and modernization lagged behind British forces.

description.zh: 由地方首领、封地贵族和警备体系维持，负责治安、护运和边地控制，战斗力依地区而异。
description.en: Maintained by local chiefs, jagirdar nobles, and policing structures, these forces were responsible for security, convoy protection, and frontier control, with combat value varying by region.

commanderInChief.zh: 尼扎姆为名义最高统帅，实际军政由宫廷军务大臣与英国影响下的顾问体系分掌
commanderInChief.en: The Nizam was the nominal commander-in-chief, while practical military management was shared by court military ministers and advisory structures operating under British influence

technology.zh: 军备处于晚期前现代向早期近代过渡阶段，主要使用火绳枪、燧发枪、滑膛火炮和传统骑兵装备；部分操典和组织受英国影响，但整体未完成工业化军事改革。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a transitional stage between the late pre-modern and early modern worlds, relying mainly on matchlocks, flintlocks, smoothbore artillery, and traditional cavalry equipment; some drill and organization showed British influence, but the army had not undergone full industrial-age reform.

threats.zh: 外部主要威胁并非邻国全面入侵，而是对英国的依附所带来的主权收缩风险，以及周边土邦、地方豪强和边地骚乱。若与英属印度利益冲突，海得拉巴缺乏独立对抗能力。
threats.en: The chief external danger was not full-scale invasion by neighbors but the erosion of sovereignty under British dependence, alongside regional princely rivalries, powerful local magnates, and frontier unrest. In any direct clash with British Indian interests, Hyderabad lacked the capacity for independent resistance.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约八百万，构成高度多元，以农村居民占绝对多数。泰卢固语群体人数最多，其次为马拉地语、卡纳达语和达赫尼乌尔都语社群；宗教上印度教徒占多数，穆斯林为重要统治与城市人口。
populationDescription.en: The population of about eight million was highly diverse and overwhelmingly rural. Telugu-speaking communities formed the largest bloc, followed by Marathi, Kannada, and Dakhni Urdu-speaking groups; religiously, Hindus were the majority, while Muslims formed an important ruling and urban population.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为尼扎姆家族、佩加贵族、军政官僚与大地主；中层为商人、钱庄主、文书、宗教人士与熟练工匠；下层为小农、佃农、农业雇工、城市劳工及各类依附性社群。种姓、宗教、语言与封地关系共同塑造社会等级。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the Nizam’s family, Paigah nobles, military-bureaucratic elites, and major landholders; the middle levels included merchants, bankers, scribes, religious specialists, and skilled artisans; the lower strata were made up of small peasants, tenants, agricultural laborers, urban workers, and dependent communities. Caste, religion, language, and landed ties all shaped social hierarchy.

allies.zh: 主要依附并合作于英属印度体系，与若干周边土邦保持礼仪性友好关系
allies.en: Its principal alignment was with the British Indian system, alongside ceremonially cordial relations with several neighboring princely states

enemies.zh: 无正式全面战争中的国家级宿敌，但对任何可能削弱其自治权的英国干预、地方叛乱势力和边境不稳因素保持警惕
enemies.en: It had no formal state-level arch-enemy in open war, but remained wary of British interventions that could reduce its autonomy, as well as local rebel elements and border instability

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以守成为主：承认英国在外交上的主导地位，换取内部统治延续；同时通过朝贡礼仪、婚姻与贵族关系、边境协商和商业往来维持德干地区影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was essentially conservative: Hyderabad accepted British predominance in external affairs in exchange for continuity of internal rule; at the same time it sustained influence in the Deccan through ceremonial diplomacy, elite marriage and noble ties, border negotiation, and commerce.

era.zh: 工业革命时代中的前工业—早期近代过渡阶段
era.en: A pre-industrial to early modern transitional stage within the age of the Industrial Revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 技术基础仍以传统灌溉、手工纺织、铸炮与金属工艺、城市建筑和文书行政为主；受英国影响，部分军队操练、会计制度、道路改良和标准化文书出现渐进变化，但蒸汽工业、铁路与机械化生产尚未在本国普及。
keyInnovations.en: Its technological base still rested on traditional irrigation, handloom weaving, artillery casting and metal crafts, urban construction, and documentary administration; under British influence there were gradual changes in military drill, accounting, road improvement, and standardized paperwork, but steam industry, railways, and mechanized production had not yet become established within the state.

strengths.zh: 疆域广阔、人口众多、农业基础深厚、财政在1840年前后相对稳定，且拥有重要的宫廷文化声望和德干地区的政治中心地位。
strengths.en: Its strengths included extensive territory, a large population, a deep agrarian base, relatively stable finances around 1840, and significant courtly prestige as a political center of the Deccan.

weaknesses.zh: 国家结构受封地分权、财政征收低效、军队现代化不足和对英国体系依赖所制约；中央对边远地区与贵族封地的控制并不总是稳固。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in fragmented landed authority, inefficient revenue extraction, insufficient military modernization, and dependence on the British system; central control over distant regions and noble estates was not always firm.

outlook.zh: 短期内海得拉巴在英国保护下仍可保持稳定与王朝延续，但长期前景取决于能否改善财政、整顿地方行政并在不触怒英国的前提下推进有限现代化；若失去这种平衡，其自治空间将持续收缩。
outlook.en: In the short term Hyderabad could remain stable and dynastically secure under British protection, but its longer-term prospects depended on improving finances, tightening provincial administration, and pursuing limited modernization without provoking British hostility; if that balance failed, its room for autonomous action would continue to shrink.

description.zh: 德干地区最大的土邦之一，在英属印度体系下保有内部统治权。
description.en: One of the largest princely states of the Deccan, retaining internal authority within the British Indian system.

ruler.zh: 克里希纳拉贾·瓦迪亚尔三世

governmentForm.zh: 受英国监督的世袭君主制土邦国家
governmentForm.en: Hereditary princely monarchy under British supervision

socialStructure.zh: 社会以农村农业人口为主体，上层由王室、宫廷贵族、婆罗门官僚、地方地主与寺庙机构构成；中层包括商人、手工业者和城镇服务群体；底层为佃农、小农、劳动者及受种姓等级约束的从属社群。宗教机构、种姓秩序和地方共同体在社会组织中具有重要作用。
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly rural and agrarian. The upper strata consisted of the royal family, court nobles, Brahmin officials, local landlords, and temple institutions; the middle strata included merchants, artisans, and urban service groups; the lower strata were made up of tenants, small cultivators, laborers, and subordinate communities constrained by caste hierarchy. Religious institutions, caste order, and village communities played major roles in social organization.

rulingClass.zh: 瓦迪亚尔王室、宫廷婆罗门官僚、迪万及其行政集团、地方大地主与受国家承认的显贵
rulingClass.en: The Wadiyar royal house, court Brahmin bureaucrats, the Diwan and his administrative circle, major local landholders, and state-recognized notables

succession.zh: 王朝世袭，以瓦迪亚尔家族男性继承为主，必要时可通过宗族内收养维持王统，并须得到英国当局承认
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession, primarily through the male line of the Wadiyar family, with adoption within the lineage when necessary to preserve the dynasty, subject to British recognition

structure.zh: 1840年的迈索尔名义上由大君主统治，但实际政务在英国驻扎官监督下由宫廷与迪万体系执行。国家行政兼具传统王廷治理与近代化文书官僚特征，中央集权程度高于一般小型土邦，但对外事务与重要军事事务受英方制约。
structure.en: In 1840 Mysore was nominally ruled by the Maharaja, but actual administration was carried out through the court and the Diwan under the supervision of the British Resident. Its state system combined traditional palace governance with increasingly formal bureaucratic record-keeping. Central authority was stronger than in many smaller princely states, though external affairs and major military matters were constrained by the British.

function.zh: 管理宫廷、王室产业、礼仪、赏赐、宫殿维护与王室文书
function.en: Managed the court, royal estates, ceremonial affairs, patronage, palace maintenance, and royal documentation

function.zh: 负责土地丈量、田赋征收、预算核算、库藏管理及部分垄断收入
function.en: Handled land measurement, collection of land revenue, budget accounting, treasury management, and certain monopoly revenues

function.zh: 审理民刑案件，维护治安，监督地方执法与监禁设施
function.en: Heard civil and criminal cases, maintained public order, and supervised local law enforcement and detention facilities

name.zh: 地方行政与公共工程署
name.en: Provincial Administration and Public Works Department

function.zh: 管理地方官吏、道路、灌溉水塘、水利修缮及部分公共建筑
function.en: Managed local officials, roads, irrigation tanks, waterworks repairs, and certain public buildings

function.zh: 监督市场、贸易通道、通行税、特定商品生产及王室工场
function.en: Oversaw markets, trade routes, transit duties, certain commodity production, and royal workshops

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通常划分为若干地区单位，由受王廷委任的官员、税务承办人及村社首领共同运作。村庄仍是基层治理核心，村长、会计与传统社群领袖在税赋分配、治安协调与土地记录中作用显著。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into district-level units administered by palace-appointed officials, revenue intermediaries, and village headmen. The village remained the core unit of governance, with headmen, accountants, and traditional community leaders playing important roles in tax allocation, order, and land records.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为王令、习惯法、印度教法传统、穆斯林法在特定社群中的适用，以及英国监督下逐渐规范的行政司法并存。重大案件和敏感事务往往受到驻扎官或英印政治部门影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined royal decrees, customary law, Hindu legal tradition, the application of Islamic law within certain communities, and increasingly regularized administrative justice under British supervision. Major cases and politically sensitive matters were often influenced by the Resident or the political authorities of British India.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入以土地税为核心，辅以市场税、关卡税、牧税、专业执照费及部分国有或垄断性收入。税制在形式上较为系统，但在执行层面仍受地方差异、收成波动和中间征收环节影响。
taxationSystem.en: State revenue rested primarily on land tax, supplemented by market dues, transit and customs charges, grazing taxes, professional license fees, and some state or monopoly income. The system was relatively structured in form, though actual collection was shaped by local variation, harvest fluctuations, and intermediary extraction.

religion.zh: 印度教为主导宗教，王室对毗湿奴派、湿婆派寺庙及传统祭祀均有赞助；同时境内也有穆斯林、耆那教徒和基督徒社群。宗教生活与节庆、寺庙经济、慈善施舍和地方身份紧密相连。
religion.en: Hinduism was the dominant religion, with royal patronage extending to Vaishnavite and Shaivite temples and traditional ritual life; the kingdom also contained Muslim, Jain, and Christian communities. Religious life was closely tied to festivals, temple economies, charity, and local identity.

philosophy.zh: 思想文化以南印度印度教经学、王朝赞助的梵文与卡纳达文文学、宗教伦理及宫廷学术传统为主，并逐步接触英属印度带来的行政理性、测绘、教育和实用知识观念。
philosophy.en: Intellectual culture centered on South Indian Hindu scholasticism, Sanskrit and Kannada literary traditions under royal patronage, religious ethics, and courtly learning, while gradually encountering administrative rationality, surveying, education, and practical knowledge associated with British India.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用卡纳达文字书写卡纳达语，官方、宗教和学术场合亦常见梵文；波斯文和乌尔都文在部分穆斯林及行政传统中仍有余绪，英语影响开始上升。
writingSystem.en: The primary script was Kannada for the Kannada language, while Sanskrit remained important in official, religious, and scholarly contexts; Persian and Urdu traditions survived in some Muslim and administrative settings, and the influence of English was beginning to grow.

culturalAchievements.zh: 迈索尔在王室赞助下延续了卡纳达文学、宗教建筑修缮、宫廷音乐与仪式文化传统。克里希纳拉贾·瓦迪亚尔三世本人以文艺赞助著称，宫廷手工艺、象牙雕刻、纺织与绘画亦具地方特色。
culturalAchievements.en: Under royal patronage, Mysore sustained Kannada literature, temple renovation, court music, and ceremonial culture. Krishnaraja Wadiyar III was noted for literary and artistic patronage, while court crafts, ivory carving, textiles, and painting also possessed distinctive regional character.

languageFamily.zh: 以德拉威语系的卡纳达语为主体，并有泰米尔语、泰卢固语、图卢语、乌尔都语、梵语及其他地方语言并存
languageFamily.en: Predominantly Dravidian-speaking with Kannada as the principal language, alongside Tamil, Telugu, Tulu, Urdu, Sanskrit, and other local languages

gdpDescription.zh: 迈索尔经济以农业为绝对核心，辅以区域性手工业、林产、牲畜、食糖、油料加工与有限的长途贸易。就南亚内陆土邦而言，经济基础相对稳固，灌溉与肥沃高原农业支撑了人口与财政，但整体仍属前工业农业经济，仅在英国主导的商业网络中部分整合。
gdpDescription.en: Mysore's economy was overwhelmingly agrarian, supplemented by regional handicrafts, forest products, livestock, sugar, oil processing, and limited long-distance trade. By the standards of inland South Asian princely states, its base was relatively solid: irrigation and productive plateau agriculture supported both population and revenue. Yet it remained a pre-industrial agrarian economy only partially integrated into British-led commercial networks.

mainIndustries.zh: 稻米、黍类、甘蔗、豆类和油料作物种植；桑蚕与丝绸；棉纺与织布；檀香、木材与林产采集；制糖、榨油、陶器、金属手工、象牙与木工艺；畜牧及地区贸易运输
mainIndustries.en: Cultivation of rice, millets, sugarcane, pulses, and oilseeds; sericulture and silk; cotton spinning and weaving; sandalwood, timber, and forest extraction; sugar making, oil pressing, pottery, metal crafts, ivory and woodwork; livestock and regional transport trade

tradeGoods.zh: 输出稻米、糖、油料、纺织品、丝绸、檀香木、木材、牲畜和地方手工艺品；输入金属制品、盐、部分奢侈品、军需物资、欧洲制造品及经英属印度转运的国际商品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included rice, sugar, oilseeds, textiles, silk, sandalwood, timber, livestock, and local handicrafts; imports included metal goods, salt, certain luxuries, military supplies, European manufactures, and internationally traded goods routed through British India

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度依赖土地、牲畜、收成和村社资源。多数农村家庭仅有有限余粮与小额银币储蓄，富裕程度差异显著；地主、税务中间人、商人和宫廷服务阶层拥有更多可变现资产、珠宝和地租收益。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth depended heavily on land, livestock, harvests, and village resources. Most rural households possessed only limited surplus grain and small silver savings, with strong variation in prosperity; landlords, revenue intermediaries, merchants, and court service groups controlled greater liquid assets, jewelry, and rent income.

economicSystem.zh: 以土地税驱动的农业君主制经济，结合地方市场交换、手工业生产、寺庙与宫廷再分配，以及在英国政治经济框架下逐渐扩张的商品化贸易
economicSystem.en: An agrarian monarchical economy driven by land revenue, combined with local market exchange, handicraft production, temple and court redistribution, and gradually expanding commercialization within the political economy of British India

source.en: Customs, market dues, and transit duties

source.zh: 王室产业、林产与垄断收入
source.en: Royal estates, forest income, and monopolies

source.zh: 司法罚金、执照费及杂项
source.en: Judicial fines, license fees, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 向英国支付的补助与政治义务支出
category.en: Payments to the British and political obligations

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，能够维持宫廷、地方行政与常备治安开支，并保留一定储备以应对歉收、英方追加要求或地方动荡。但财政自主性受英国监督及对外主权受限所削弱。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, able to sustain court, administrative, and standing security expenses while retaining a modest reserve against poor harvests, additional British demands, or local disturbances. However, fiscal autonomy was weakened by British oversight and restricted external sovereignty.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持稳定征收、避免激烈税改、优先确保地税收入和政治性付款为核心，同时有限投入灌溉修复与道路改善，以保持农业产出和社会秩序。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on stable collection, avoidance of drastic tax reform, and prioritization of land revenue and politically necessary payments, while devoting limited funds to irrigation repair and road improvement in order to preserve agricultural output and social order.

description.zh: 以地方招募和旧式编制为基础，部分单位接受英印式操练，装备火绳枪、燧发枪及冷兵器，主要承担守备和内部治安任务。
description.en: Based on local recruitment and older formations, with some units drilled in the manner of British India. They were equipped with matchlocks, flintlocks, and edged weapons, and primarily served in garrison and internal security roles.

description.zh: 规模较小，多用于传令、巡逻、护卫和快速镇压地方骚乱，而非进行大规模野战冲击。
description.en: Relatively small in number, used chiefly for dispatch, patrol, escort, and rapid response to local unrest rather than large-scale battlefield shock.

description.zh: 保有若干火炮和训练有素的炮兵骨干，但总体规模和技术水平均受英方限制，更多用于要地防守与礼仪展示。
description.en: Maintained a number of guns and a trained artillery cadre, but overall scale and technical development were limited by British restrictions; artillery was used mainly for key-point defense and ceremonial display.

description.zh: 由各地警备、城防和临时召集人员构成，在需要时支援治安、护税和道路巡防。
description.en: Comprised local guards, town defense contingents, and temporarily mobilized men, supporting policing, tax protection, and road patrol when needed.

commanderInChief.zh: 迈索尔大君主名义统帅，实际军事事务受迪万与英国驻扎官监督
commanderInChief.en: The Maharaja was nominal commander-in-chief, while practical military affairs were supervised by the Diwan and the British Resident

technology.zh: 军事技术处于火器时代的中低水平，以旧式火枪、少量较新燧发枪、传统炮兵和冷兵器并用。与提普苏丹时期相比，军事实验性和独立军工能力明显下降，且不得建立足以挑战英方的现代化军队。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a lower-middle firearms-era level, combining older muskets, some newer flintlocks, traditional artillery, and edged weapons. Compared with the era of Tipu Sultan, military experimentation and independent war-making capacity had declined sharply, and Mysore was not permitted to develop a modern army capable of challenging British power.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非外部征服战争，而是英国对内部治理失误的干预、地方税务骚乱、歉收导致的治安问题，以及在英印政治格局中被进一步削弱自主权的风险。
threats.en: The chief threats were not external conquest wars but British intervention in case of maladministration, local revenue unrest, law-and-order problems arising from bad harvests, and the risk of further erosion of autonomy within the political framework of British India.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约三百万，以农村居民为绝大多数，分布于高原耕作区、灌溉带、林地边缘与若干城镇中心。人口密度在可耕作与水利条件较好的地区较高，受季风和农业周期影响明显。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 3 million, overwhelmingly rural and distributed across plateau farming zones, irrigated tracts, forest margins, and a limited number of towns. Population density was higher in arable and well-watered areas, and demographic life was strongly shaped by the monsoon and agricultural cycles.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、婆罗门文官与祭司、地主和税收中间人、商人与放贷者、手工业者、农民、佃户、牧民、劳工及受压迫种姓群体共同构成社会阶层。阶层身份与种姓、职业、土地占有和宗教赞助密切相关。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included the royal family and nobles, Brahmin officials and priests, landlords and revenue intermediaries, merchants and moneylenders, artisans, peasants, tenants, pastoralists, laborers, and oppressed caste communities. Social rank was closely tied to caste, occupation, landholding, and access to religious patronage.

allies.zh: 无真正独立意义上的正式盟友；主要政治依附对象为英属印度当局，与周边南印度土邦保持谨慎而从属的往来
allies.en: No fully independent allies in the sovereign sense; its primary political connection was with the authorities of British India, while it maintained cautious and subordinate relations with neighboring South Indian princely states

enemies.zh: 1840年无公开敌国；潜在摩擦主要来自英国对其内政和财政的监督压力，以及与邻近行政辖区在边界、税务和司法事务上的零星争议
enemies.en: There was no open enemy state in 1840; potential friction arose chiefly from British pressure over internal administration and finance, as well as occasional disputes with neighboring jurisdictions over boundaries, taxation, and legal matters

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策极为有限，重心在于维持王朝地位、避免触怒英国、保持内部稳定并争取在宗教文化和地方行政领域保留尽可能多的自主空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was extremely limited, focusing on preserving the dynasty, avoiding conflict with the British, maintaining internal stability, and retaining as much autonomy as possible in religious, cultural, and local administrative affairs.

era.zh: 工业革命时代下的前工业南亚土邦
era.en: A pre-industrial South Asian princely state in the age of the Industrial Revolution

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非自主工业突破，而是土地丈量、账册行政、道路与灌溉修缮、丝绸与手工业技术延续，以及通过英属印度接触到的近代测绘、火器操练和文书规范。相较欧洲工业国家，机械化和工厂化极为有限。
keyInnovations.en: Its key technical features were not autonomous industrial breakthroughs but improved land survey, bookkeeping administration, road and irrigation repair, continuity in silk and handicraft techniques, and growing exposure through British India to modern surveying, firearms drill, and documentary standardization. Compared with industrial Europe, mechanization and factory production were extremely limited.

strengths.zh: 农业基础扎实、王朝合法性较强、文化传统深厚、财政总体尚稳、地方治理网络成熟，且在英国保护伞下免于大规模外敌入侵。
strengths.en: Its strengths included a solid agricultural base, strong dynastic legitimacy, deep cultural traditions, generally stable finances, mature local governance networks, and protection from large-scale foreign invasion under British dominance.

weaknesses.zh: 主权受限、军事自主性低、经济结构单一、社会等级与种姓分化明显、基础设施现代化不足，且一旦被指控治理失当即可能遭受更严厉的英国接管。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses were limited sovereignty, low military autonomy, a narrow agrarian economic structure, pronounced social and caste inequality, insufficient infrastructural modernization, and vulnerability to stricter British takeover if accused of maladministration.

outlook.zh: 短期内迈索尔有望维持稳定与王朝延续，但其未来取决于能否在英国监督下改善财政和行政表现。若治理被认定失效，王权可能进一步被架空；若能保持秩序并适度改革，则仍可作为重要南印度土邦延续存在。
outlook.en: In the short term Mysore was likely to remain stable and preserve dynastic continuity, but its future depended on improving fiscal and administrative performance under British supervision. If governance were judged ineffective, royal authority could be further hollowed out; if order were maintained and moderate reform pursued, it could continue as an important South Indian princely state.

description.zh: 南印度重要土邦，在英方监控下维持传统王朝统治。
description.en: An important South Indian princely state maintaining traditional dynastic rule under British oversight.

governmentForm.zh: 君主制，名义上为中央集权王国，实际上受部族联盟、地方首领与英国军事支持共同制约
governmentForm.en: Monarchy, nominally a centralized kingdom but in practice constrained by tribal coalitions, local chiefs, and British military backing

socialStructure.zh: 社会以部族、宗族与地方共同体为核心，上层为王室、萨多宰与巴拉克宰等贵族家族、宗教学者与部族汗，下层为牧民、农民、手工业者与商人，城市人口比例较低
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on tribes, kinship groups, and local communities. The upper strata included the royal house, noble Durrani lineages such as the Sadozai and Barakzai, religious scholars, and tribal khans, while the lower strata consisted of pastoralists, peasants, artisans, and merchants; urban society remained limited

rulingClass.zh: 杜兰尼王室、普什图部族贵族、地方汗与伊斯兰宗教精英
rulingClass.en: The Durrani royal house, Pashtun tribal nobility, regional khans, and Islamic religious elites

succession.zh: 王位原则上实行王朝世袭，但常因宗族竞争、部族支持与武力夺位而反复争夺
succession.en: The throne was in principle hereditary within the dynasty, but in practice succession was frequently contested through clan rivalry, tribal backing, and armed seizure

structure.zh: 1840年的阿富汗政权为围绕喀布尔宫廷运作的君主政体。中央朝廷对喀布尔及周边地区控制较强，但对坎大哈、加兹尼、赫拉特以外广阔山地和部族地带的支配十分有限。英国驻军、使节与财政支援在沙阿·舒贾复位后对政务产生重大影响
structure.en: The Afghan polity in 1840 was a monarchical regime operating around the court at Kabul. The central court exercised stronger control over Kabul and nearby districts, but its authority over Kandahar, Ghazni, and the wider mountain and tribal zones was highly limited. After Shah Shuja’s restoration, British garrisons, envoys, and financial support significantly influenced governance

name.zh: 王室宫廷与御前秘书处

function.zh: 处理诏令、接见、王室财政分配、任命文书与与英国代表往来
function.en: Handled decrees, audiences, royal financial allocations, appointment documents, and correspondence with British representatives

function.zh: 征收土地税、市场税、关卡税及向地方首领索取贡赋，管理王室收入
function.en: Collected land taxes, market dues, transit levies, and tribute from local chiefs, and managed royal revenue

function.zh: 联络地方总督、部族汗与边地首领，协调效忠、驻军与纠纷调停
function.en: Maintained relations with provincial governors, tribal khans, and frontier chiefs, coordinating allegiance, garrisons, and dispute mediation

function.zh: 任命卡齐与宗教法官，处理婚姻、继承、商业与刑事案件中的教法事务
function.en: Appointed qadis and religious judges and handled sharia matters in marriage, inheritance, commerce, and criminal cases

function.zh: 统筹王室亲军、地方征召、堡垒补给与对英军协同行动
function.en: Coordinated the royal guard, local levies, fortress supply, and cooperative operations with British forces

function.zh: 管理清真寺、宗教学校、瓦克夫地产与乌里玛关系
function.en: Managed mosques, madrasas, waqf properties, and relations with the ulama

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依赖总督、城堡长官、税吏和部族中介人。许多地区并无稳定常设官僚体系，而是通过向部族领袖发放俸金、承认其自治权与临时谈判来维持服从
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on governors, fortress commanders, tax collectors, and tribal intermediaries. Many regions lacked a stable standing bureaucracy and were governed through stipends to tribal leaders, recognition of local autonomy, and ad hoc negotiation

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以逊尼派哈乃斐学派伊斯兰教法为基础，并与部族习惯法并行。王室法令、地方惯例和部族仲裁共同构成实际司法秩序
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on Sunni Hanafi Islamic law and operated alongside tribal customary law. Royal decrees, local custom, and tribal arbitration together formed the practical judicial order

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要包括农业土地税、灌溉地与园圃征课、牲畜税、商税、市场税与山口关税。由于战争与地方离心，征收极不均衡，许多收入依赖临时贡赋和外部补贴
taxationSystem.en: Taxation consisted mainly of agricultural land taxes, assessments on irrigated land and orchards, livestock taxes, customs dues, market tolls, and mountain pass transit charges. Because of war and local fragmentation, collection was highly uneven, and much revenue depended on ad hoc tribute and outside subsidies

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教占绝对主导，主要为逊尼派哈乃斐学派，亦有什叶派群体如部分哈扎拉和奇兹尔巴什社群。宗教生活深受清真寺、乌里玛、苏菲网络和圣裔家族影响
religion.en: Islam overwhelmingly predominated, chiefly Sunni of the Hanafi school, though Shi'a communities also existed, including among some Hazaras and Qizilbash groups. Religious life was deeply shaped by mosques, the ulama, Sufi networks, and families claiming sacred descent

philosophy.zh: 思想基础以伊斯兰政治伦理、部族荣誉观念、宗教法学和苏菲虔敬传统为核心。国家认同仍弱于王朝忠诚、宗教共同体认同与部族归属
philosophy.en: The intellectual foundation centered on Islamic political ethics, tribal codes of honor, religious jurisprudence, and Sufi devotional traditions. State identity remained weaker than dynastic loyalty, religious community, and tribal affiliation

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为改造后的波斯-阿拉伯字母，用于波斯语和普什图语行政、诗歌与书信；阿拉伯语则用于宗教学术文本
writingSystem.en: The principal writing system was the modified Perso-Arabic script, used for Persian and Pashto in administration, poetry, and correspondence; Arabic was employed for religious scholarship

culturalAchievements.zh: 19世纪初阿富汗文化成就主要体现在波斯语宫廷文学、普什图诗歌、宗教教育、书法和地方建筑传统上。喀布尔、坎大哈与赫拉特虽受战乱影响，仍保持区域性文人和商旅文化交流
culturalAchievements.en: Afghan cultural achievements in the early nineteenth century were expressed mainly in Persian courtly literature, Pashto poetry, religious education, calligraphy, and regional architectural traditions. Kabul, Kandahar, and Herat, though affected by warfare, still maintained regional circuits of learned and mercantile cultural exchange

languageFamily.zh: 以伊朗语族语言为主，达里波斯语为宫廷和行政通用语，普什图语为主要部族与政治语言之一，另有突厥语和其他地方语言
languageFamily.en: Iranian languages predominated: Dari Persian served as the courtly and administrative lingua franca, while Pashto was one of the principal tribal and political languages; Turkic and other local languages were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 阿富汗经济以自给性农业、畜牧业和区域转运贸易为基础。山地地形限制大规模农业盈余，但其连接印度、中亚与伊朗的地理位置使通道税和商旅贸易具有重要价值。1840年因战争、军队掠夺和交通不稳，经济活动显著受扰
gdpDescription.en: The Afghan economy rested on subsistence agriculture, pastoralism, and regional transit trade. Mountainous terrain limited large agricultural surpluses, but the country’s position between India, Central Asia, and Iran gave customs and caravan trade considerable value. In 1840, warfare, military exactions, and insecure routes significantly disrupted economic life

mainIndustries.zh: 小麦与大麦种植、果园与葡萄干生产、畜牧与羊毛、马匹贸易、地毯与毛织品、皮革、地方金属加工、商队运输与关税征收
mainIndustries.en: Wheat and barley cultivation, orchards and raisin production, pastoralism and wool, horse trading, carpets and woolens, leatherwork, local metalworking, caravan transport, and customs collection

tradeGoods.zh: 出口与转运商品包括马匹、羊毛、干果、皮张、阿萨费提达胶、地毯；输入商品包括印度棉布、糖、香料、金属制品、军火与奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exported and transit goods included horses, wool, dried fruits, hides, asafoetida, and carpets; imports included Indian cotton textiles, sugar, spices, metal goods, arms, and luxury wares

name.zh: 阿富汗卢比与提拉银币
name.en: Afghan rupee and tilla silver coinage

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富主要以土地使用权、灌溉水权、牲畜、谷物储备、武器和家族网络体现，货币储蓄有限且分布不均
