enemies.en: It had no permanent enemy in an open ongoing war, but its principal strategic and political rival was Austria, while France remained a potential opponent; it also took a hard line against Polish nationalist movements

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护王朝秩序、增强在德意志邦联中的主导权、扩大关税同盟影响和避免孤立为核心。普鲁士倾向以行政效率、经济整合和有限军事威慑来逐步削弱奥地利的德意志领导地位
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving dynastic order, increasing Prussian predominance within the German Confederation, expanding the influence of the Zollverein, and avoiding diplomatic isolation. Prussia tended to use administrative efficiency, economic integration, and limited military deterrence to gradually undermine Austrian leadership in Germany

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路建设、焦炭炼铁与近代煤铁工业、系统化矿业技术、现代参谋制度、测绘与统计行政、洪堡式大学科研体系、电报试验与机械制造能力的扩张
keyInnovations.en: Railway construction, coke-based iron production and modern coal-iron industry, systematized mining techniques, the modern general staff system, cartographic and statistical administration, the Humboldtian university-research model, telegraph experimentation, and expanding mechanical manufacturing capacity

strengths.zh: 普鲁士的最大优势在于高效官僚制、纪律严明的军队、持续扩展的工业基础、优良教育体系以及通过关税同盟整合德意志市场的能力。这些因素使其在1840年已具备挑战奥地利德意志霸权的现实基础
strengths.en: Prussia's greatest strengths lay in its efficient bureaucracy, disciplined army, expanding industrial base, strong educational system, and ability to integrate the German market through the Zollverein. These factors gave it by 1840 a real foundation for challenging Austrian predominance in Germany

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点包括地域分散、东西部发展不平衡、政治制度保守、社会矛盾上升以及贵族军政精英对改革的掣肘。民族问题，特别是波兰地区的不满，也削弱了国家整合
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included geographically scattered territories, uneven east-west development, a conservative political order, rising social tensions, and the obstructive influence of aristocratic military-bureaucratic elites on reform. Nationality issues, especially discontent in Polish regions, also weakened state integration

outlook.zh: 前景总体强劲。若能继续推进铁路、工业、财政整合和德意志关税领导，并在不引发欧洲列强联合干预的情况下处理与奥地利的竞争，普鲁士极可能在未来数十年成为统一德意志的核心力量
outlook.en: The outlook was broadly strong. If it continued advancing railways, industry, fiscal integration, and customs leadership in Germany, and managed its rivalry with Austria without provoking combined intervention by the great powers, Prussia was highly likely to become the core force in future German unification

description.zh: 德意志强国之一，凭借行政与工业优势逐渐挑战奥地利的领导地位。
description.en: One of the leading German powers, increasingly challenging Austrian leadership through administrative and industrial strength.

governmentForm.zh: 七月王朝下的立宪君主制，以受财产资格限制的议会代表制为基础
governmentForm.en: A constitutional monarchy under the July Monarchy, based on parliamentary representation restricted by property qualifications

socialStructure.zh: 社会由金融资产阶级、工业与商业中产阶级、地主贵族、城市工匠与工人、小农和农村雇工构成；政治权力主要集中于纳税资格选民和上层资产阶级手中
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the financial bourgeoisie, industrial and commercial middle classes, landed nobility, urban artisans and workers, small peasants, and rural laborers; political power was concentrated largely in the hands of tax-qualified voters and the upper bourgeoisie

rulingClass.zh: 上层资产阶级、金融家、高级官僚、议会精英以及与王朝妥协的旧贵族
rulingClass.en: The upper bourgeoisie, financiers, senior bureaucrats, parliamentary elites, and segments of the old nobility reconciled with the dynasty

succession.zh: 奥尔良王朝的男性优先王位世袭继承，受1814年宪章传统与1830年政制实践约束
succession.en: Male-preference dynastic hereditary succession within the House of Orleans, constrained by the constitutional traditions of the 1814 Charter and the political settlement of 1830

structure.zh: 中央政府由国王、内阁、贵族院和众议院组成。国王任命大臣并在外交、军队和行政上拥有重要影响，但法律与预算需通过两院。1840年法国政局由议会派系、宫廷影响与官僚体系共同运作。
structure.en: The central government consisted of the king, the ministry, the Chamber of Peers, and the Chamber of Deputies. The king appointed ministers and retained major influence over diplomacy, the army, and administration, but laws and budgets required the approval of both chambers. In 1840 French politics operated through a combination of parliamentary factions, court influence, and the bureaucratic state.

function.zh: 管理省级行政、警察监督、地方选举、公共秩序、基础设施协调与人口统计
function.en: Oversaw provincial administration, police supervision, local elections, public order, infrastructure coordination, and population statistics

function.zh: 负责税收征解、国库、公共债务、海关、预算编制与审计
function.en: Managed tax collection, the treasury, public debt, customs, budget preparation, and auditing

function.zh: 统筹陆军编制、驻军、征兵、军需、军官任命及阿尔及利亚作战
function.en: Coordinated army organization, garrisons, conscription, logistics, officer appointments, and operations in Algeria

name.en: Ministry of the Navy and Colonies

function.zh: 管理舰队、海军基地、海外殖民地、海上补给与殖民行政联系
function.en: Managed the fleet, naval bases, overseas colonies, maritime supply, and communications with colonial administrations

function.zh: 负责欧洲外交、条约谈判、驻外使节体系与东方问题政策
function.en: Handled European diplomacy, treaty negotiations, the diplomatic corps, and policy concerning the Eastern Question

function.zh: 管理法院系统、检察机构、监狱事务和法典实施
function.en: Oversaw the court system, prosecution service, prisons, and implementation of the legal codes

function.zh: 负责中学、高等教育、国家考试、部分小学监督及学术机构
function.en: Supervised secondary and higher education, state examinations, parts of primary school oversight, and academic institutions

localAdmin.zh: 法国本土划分为省，由中央任命的省长领导；省下设区、副省长、县和市镇，体现高度中央集权的行政体系。市长在较大程度上受中央影响或由上级任命，地方自治有限。
localAdmin.en: Metropolitan France was divided into departments led by centrally appointed prefects; beneath them were arrondissements, sub-prefects, cantons, and communes, reflecting a highly centralized administrative system. Mayors were heavily influenced by the central state or appointed from above, and local self-government remained limited.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以《拿破仑法典》及其相关民法、商法、刑法和诉讼法典为核心，结合王国时期宪制实践。法院分层设置，包括初审法院、上诉法院与最高审级的破毁法院；行政争议则由行政法体系与国务会议处理。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was centered on the Napoleonic Codes and related civil, commercial, criminal, and procedural codes, combined with constitutional practice under the monarchy. Courts were organized in tiers, including trial courts, courts of appeal, and the Court of Cassation at the summit; administrative disputes were handled through the administrative law system and the Council of State.

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政主要依赖间接税、关税、盐酒烟等消费税、土地税、门窗税及营业执照税。税制对普通消费与乡村人口负担较重，而政治参与则与直接纳税资格挂钩，强化了富裕纳税人的影响。
taxationSystem.en: State finance relied chiefly on indirect taxes, customs duties, excises on goods such as salt, alcohol, and tobacco, land taxes, the doors-and-windows tax, and license taxes on trades. The system placed a considerable burden on ordinary consumption and rural taxpayers, while political participation was tied to direct tax qualifications, strengthening the influence of wealthy taxpayers.

religion.zh: 天主教为社会中的主要宗教与文化传统，但国家在1830年后更强调世俗宪政平衡；新教、犹太教受法律承认，反教权与自由主义思潮在城市中日益活跃
religion.en: Catholicism remained the principal religion and cultural tradition, though after 1830 the state emphasized a more secular constitutional balance; Protestantism and Judaism were legally recognized, and anticlerical and liberal currents were increasingly active in the cities

philosophy.zh: 法国思想界兼具启蒙遗产、自由主义、保守主义、天主教复兴、空想社会主义与浪漫主义；基佐式自由保守主义、拉梅奈宗教自由论、圣西门主义与共和主义均具有影响力
philosophy.en: French intellectual life combined the legacy of the Enlightenment with liberalism, conservatism, Catholic revival, utopian socialism, and Romanticism; Guizot-style liberal conservatism, Lamennais's religious liberalism, Saint-Simonianism, and republicanism all exerted influence

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写的法语为国家主要书面语言，行政、教育、法律和出版高度标准化；地方仍存在布列塔尼语、奥克语、阿尔萨斯德语、巴斯克语等区域语言
writingSystem.en: French written in the Latin alphabet was the principal written language of the state, highly standardized in administration, education, law, and print; regional languages such as Breton, Occitan, Alsatian German, and Basque still persisted locally

culturalAchievements.zh: 法国在文学、绘画、史学、建筑、戏剧和音乐方面继续居欧洲前列。巴尔扎克、雨果、拉马丁等作家活跃，德拉克罗瓦推动浪漫主义绘画，巴黎是出版、报刊、沙龙文化与时尚中心。理工教育、科学院传统以及桥梁、铁路与城市工程也体现出国家文化与技术的结合。
culturalAchievements.en: France remained among Europe’s leading powers in literature, painting, historiography, architecture, theater, and music. Writers such as Balzac, Hugo, and Lamartine were active, Delacroix advanced Romantic painting, and Paris served as a center of publishing, journalism, salons, and fashion. Technical education, the academy tradition, and achievements in bridges, railways, and urban works also reflected the union of culture and technology.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族，以法语为主
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch, dominated by French

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年的法国经济是欧洲最重要的复合型经济体之一，仍以农业为主，但工业化正在加速推进。北部和东北部的煤铁、纺织、冶金和机械制造增长明显，巴黎与里昂等城市成为金融、消费和加工中心。与英国相比，法国工业化速度较缓，但其农业基础更稳健、国内市场更大、手工业与农村工业仍具有韧性。
gdpDescription.en: In 1840 France possessed one of Europe’s most important mixed economies, still predominantly agricultural but undergoing accelerating industrialization. Coal and iron, textiles, metallurgy, and machinery expanded notably in the north and northeast, while Paris and Lyon functioned as major centers of finance, consumption, and manufacturing. Compared with Britain, French industrialization proceeded more slowly, but its agrarian base was steadier, its domestic market broader, and its artisanal and rural industries remained resilient.

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食与葡萄酒生产、纺织业、丝织业、冶金、煤矿、制糖、造船、奢侈品制造、印刷出版、机械制造和军工
mainIndustries.en: Grain and wine production, textiles, silk weaving, metallurgy, coal mining, sugar refining, shipbuilding, luxury manufacturing, printing and publishing, machinery production, and armaments

tradeGoods.zh: 出口葡萄酒、丝绸、时尚与奢侈品、制成纺织品、精制金属品和部分工业品；进口棉花、煤炭、染料、殖民地原料、糖、咖啡及海外市场所需物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wine, silk, fashion and luxury goods, finished textiles, refined metal goods, and some industrial products; imports included cotton, coal, dyestuffs, colonial raw materials, sugar, coffee, and supplies tied to overseas markets

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异显著。农村小农通常拥有少量土地、牲畜和农具，能够维持基本独立，但对歉收和债务十分脆弱。城市中产阶级持有商业资本、不动产和政府公债，而工人家庭现金储蓄有限，生活受物价和就业波动影响。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Rural smallholders often possessed modest plots, livestock, and tools sufficient for basic independence, yet remained vulnerable to bad harvests and debt. Urban middle-class families held commercial capital, real estate, and government bonds, whereas working-class households had little cash savings and were exposed to fluctuations in prices and employment.

economicSystem.zh: 以私有财产、市场交换和国家保护并存的资本主义经济。政府在铁路、关税、银行、军工和殖民贸易中发挥重要引导作用，同时农村小农经济和传统手工业仍广泛存在。
economicSystem.en: A capitalist economy combining private property, market exchange, and state protection. The government played an important guiding role in railways, tariffs, banking, armaments, and colonial commerce, while peasant smallholding and traditional artisanal production remained widespread.

source.zh: 国有财产、邮政与杂项收入
source.en: State property, postal income, and miscellaneous receipts

category.zh: 陆军与阿尔及利亚战争

category.en: Debt interest and public debt service

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库维持运转能力较强，但受长期公债负担、殖民战争成本和基础设施投资需求牵制。法国信用在欧洲金融市场仍然稳固，能够通过公债与银行体系筹资。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury retained solid operating capacity, but it was constrained by the long-term burden of public debt, the cost of colonial war, and the demands of infrastructure investment. French credit remained strong on European financial markets, allowing financing through government bonds and the banking system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏保守，强调维持信用、控制赤字和依靠稳定税收，同时在铁路、港口和殖民扩张方面进行选择性投入。政府避免激进财政改革，以保护有产阶级利益与货币稳定。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, emphasizing the maintenance of credit, control of deficits, and reliance on stable taxation, while making selective investments in railways, ports, and colonial expansion. The government avoided radical fiscal reform in order to protect propertied interests and monetary stability.

description.zh: 法国军力核心，包括线列步兵、轻步兵、骑兵、炮兵、工兵及驻防部队，广泛部署于本土边境、要塞和阿尔及利亚战场
description.en: The core of French military power, including line infantry, light infantry, cavalry, artillery, engineers, and garrison troops, widely deployed on the metropolitan frontiers, in fortresses, and in Algeria

description.zh: 主要承担城市维稳、地方防卫和必要时的动员补充，政治上与有产市民阶层关系密切
description.en: Used chiefly for urban order, local defense, and mobilization reinforcement when needed, with close political ties to the propertied urban citizenry

description.zh: 包括舰队水兵、海军步兵和港口人员，用于地中海、大西洋和殖民航线作战与巡逻，并支持对阿尔及利亚的远征与补给
description.en: Included sailors, marines, and dockyard personnel, operating in the Mediterranean, Atlantic, and colonial sea lanes while supporting expeditionary and supply operations in Algeria

commanderInChief.zh: 路易-菲利普一世（名义统帅）；实际由陆军部与高级将领集团指挥
commanderInChief.en: Louis-Philippe I (nominal commander-in-chief); practical command exercised by the Ministry of War and the senior general staff

technology.zh: 军队处于火帽枪逐步普及、滑膛炮与要塞体系并用的过渡阶段。法军在炮兵传统、工兵、筑城、参谋行政和后勤组织方面仍具欧洲强国水准，但铁路军事化尚在起步，海军仍以风帆舰为主并开始接触蒸汽动力。
technology.en: The armed forces stood in a transitional phase marked by the gradual spread of percussion firearms alongside smoothbore artillery and fortress systems. France still ranked among Europe’s leading powers in artillery tradition, engineering, fortification, staff administration, and logistics, though military use of railways was only beginning, and the navy remained mainly sail-powered while starting to adopt steam.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自欧洲列强均势竞争，尤其是英国在海上与殖民事务中的竞争、莱茵边境的普鲁士与德意志局势、以及围绕奥斯曼帝国和埃及问题的外交危机。另一个持续威胁是阿尔及利亚的顽强抵抗，尤其是阿卜杜勒-卡德尔领导的反法力量。
threats.en: Major threats arose from great-power competition within the European balance, especially rivalry with Britain in maritime and colonial affairs, the Prussian and wider German situation on the Rhine frontier, and diplomatic crises surrounding the Ottoman Empire and Egypt. Another enduring threat was the stubborn resistance in Algeria, particularly the anti-French forces led by Abd al-Qadir.

populationDescription.zh: 法国人口约三千五百万，是欧洲人口最多的大国之一，但人口增长较英国和部分德意志地区更慢。多数人口仍居住在农村，小农占比高，城市化稳步上升但尚未进入全面工业城市社会。
populationDescription.en: With about 35 million inhabitants, France was one of Europe’s most populous great powers, though population growth was slower than in Britain and some German regions. Most people still lived in the countryside, with a high proportion of smallholding peasants; urbanization was rising steadily but had not yet produced a fully industrial urban society.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括王室与旧贵族、金融与工商业资产阶级、自由职业者与公务员、小店主与手工业者、城市工人、农民自耕农、佃农和农村雇工。1830年后的政治秩序明显偏向富裕纳税人，工人和广大农民在正式政治中代表不足。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included the royal house and old nobility, the financial and industrial bourgeoisie, professionals and civil servants, small shopkeepers and artisans, urban workers, peasant proprietors, tenants, and rural laborers. The political order after 1830 was clearly tilted toward wealthy taxpayers, while workers and the broad mass of peasants remained underrepresented in formal politics.

allies.zh: 法国在1840年缺乏牢固的正式大国同盟，通常寻求与西班牙、比利时及部分意大利邦国保持友好，并在欧洲自由主义舆论中拥有一定影响力
allies.en: In 1840 France lacked a firm formal great-power alliance, generally seeking friendly relations with Spain, Belgium, and some Italian states, while retaining a measure of influence within European liberal opinion

enemies.zh: 无正式全面战争中的欧洲宿敌，但与英国在东方问题和海上殖民领域竞争尖锐；在北非则与阿尔及利亚抵抗力量处于持续战争状态
enemies.en: It had no formal all-out European enemy in open war, but rivalry with Britain was sharp in the Eastern Question and in maritime-colonial affairs; in North Africa it remained in active conflict with Algerian resistance forces

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策旨在维护法国作为欧洲五强之一的地位，避免再次被反法联盟孤立，同时通过地中海影响力、比利时问题、意大利事务和阿尔及利亚殖民扩张提升威望。1840年围绕埃及总督穆罕默德·阿里的危机使法国一度在外交上孤立，暴露出其力量与声望之间的张力。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy sought to preserve France’s standing as one of the five great powers, avoid isolation by another anti-French coalition, and enhance prestige through Mediterranean influence, the Belgian question, Italian affairs, and colonial expansion in Algeria. The 1840 crisis surrounding Muhammad Ali of Egypt temporarily isolated France diplomatically and revealed the tension between its power and its ambitions.

keyInnovations.zh: 蒸汽机在矿业、纺织和交通中的应用不断扩大；铁路建设开始成网；冶金、机械制造和化学加工逐步发展；电报尚处早期阶段。法国在桥梁、公路、炮兵制造、丝织机械、精密工艺与理工教育方面具有突出实力。
keyInnovations.en: The application of steam power in mining, textiles, and transport continued to expand; railway building was beginning to form networks; metallurgy, machine production, and chemical processing were developing steadily; telegraphy remained at an early stage. France possessed notable strengths in bridges, roads, artillery manufacture, silk machinery, precision crafts, and technical education.

strengths.zh: 法国拥有庞大人口、发达农业、强有力的中央行政、深厚的金融信用、成熟的法律体系和欧洲领先的文化影响力。其军队仍具大国水准，工业化虽不及英国迅猛，但基础广泛且国内市场庞大。
strengths.en: France possessed a large population, productive agriculture, a powerful centralized administration, strong financial credit, a mature legal system, and leading cultural influence in Europe. Its army remained of great-power caliber, and although industrialization was less rapid than in Britain, it rested on a broad base and a large domestic market.

weaknesses.zh: 政体稳定建立在有限选举权和资产阶级妥协之上，社会不满潜伏。工业增长不均，铁路和煤炭产能落后于英国，财政受公债与殖民战争拖累。外交上易在欧洲均势中遭到牵制，阿尔及利亚战争持续消耗军费与政治资本。
weaknesses.en: The regime’s stability rested on restricted suffrage and a bourgeois compromise, leaving underlying social discontent unresolved. Industrial growth was uneven, railways and coal capacity lagged behind Britain, and finances were burdened by public debt and colonial war. Diplomatically, France could be checked by the European balance of power, while the Algerian war consumed military resources and political capital.

outlook.zh: 1840年的法国总体稳定而强盛，但其未来取决于能否在不激化社会冲突的前提下推进工业化、扩大政治整合并避免外交孤立。若选举制度和社会问题长期得不到缓解，表面的稳定可能在数年后转化为制度危机。
outlook.en: In 1840 France was broadly stable and powerful, but its future depended on advancing industrialization without intensifying social conflict, widening political integration, and avoiding diplomatic isolation. If the electoral system and social grievances remained unaddressed, apparent stability could within a few years turn into a crisis of regime.

description.zh: 工业化与资产阶级政治并进的欧洲大国，同时推进阿尔及利亚殖民扩张。
description.en: A major European power combining industrial growth and bourgeois politics while expanding colonial rule in Algeria.

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制与摄政统治并存的王国；1840年名义上由未成年的伊莎贝拉二世为君主，实际政权在自由派与温和派势力、宫廷网络及军政领袖之间争夺，年内由玛丽亚·克里斯蒂娜摄政向埃斯帕特罗摄政过渡
governmentForm.en: A kingdom combining constitutional monarchy with regency rule; in 1840 the underage Isabella II was monarch in name, while real power was contested among liberals, moderates, court networks, and military-political leaders, with the year witnessing a transition from the regency of Maria Christina toward that of Espartero

socialStructure.zh: 社会仍以农村人口为主，由旧贵族、教士、城市资产阶级、军官团、手工业者、小农、佃农与无地雇农构成；自由主义改革正在削弱传统等级秩序，但教会与地主的社会影响力仍然深厚
socialStructure.en: Society remained predominantly rural, composed of old nobility, clergy, urban bourgeoisie, officer corps, artisans, smallholders, tenant farmers, and landless laborers; liberal reforms were weakening the traditional estate order, but the Church and landed elites still retained deep social influence

rulingClass.zh: 宫廷波旁王室、自由派与温和派政治精英、高级军官、地主贵族及部分高阶教士
rulingClass.en: The Bourbon court, liberal and moderate political elites, senior military officers, landed nobility, and portions of the higher clergy

succession.zh: 依1830年务实诏令实行波旁王朝的认许继承制，允许女性继承王位；此安排遭卡洛斯派否认，并直接引发王位继承战争
succession.en: Succession followed the Bourbon pragmatic sanction of 1830, allowing female inheritance of the throne; this arrangement was rejected by the Carlists and directly caused the dynastic war

structure.zh: 中央政府以王室、摄政、部长会议、两院制科尔特斯及全国性司法体系为核心。1840年的体制建立在1837年宪法之上，但因战争、起义与军事干政而运作不稳，省级总督与地方市政机关在中央监督下治理地方
structure.en: The central government was centered on the crown, regency, council of ministers, bicameral Cortes, and a kingdom-wide judicial system. The 1840 system rested on the Constitution of 1837, but functioned unevenly due to war, uprisings, and military intervention, while provincial governors and municipal bodies administered the localities under central oversight

function.zh: 负责外交、对外条约、驻外使节与国际联络
function.en: Handled foreign relations, treaties, diplomatic missions, and international correspondence

function.zh: 负责税收、国债、海关、国库与预算管理
function.en: Managed taxation, public debt, customs, the treasury, and budgeting

function.zh: 负责陆军征募、补给、军官任命与国内军事行动
function.en: Oversaw army recruitment, supply, officer appointments, and domestic military operations

function.zh: 负责舰队、海军基地、殖民海上交通与海军人员
function.en: Oversaw the fleet, naval bases, colonial sea communications, and naval personnel

function.zh: 负责省级行政、公共秩序、选举事务、统计与地方监督
function.en: Handled provincial administration, public order, electoral matters, statistics, and local supervision

function.zh: 负责法院体系、法令执行、赦免、教会法相关事务与公证登记
function.en: Managed the courts, enforcement of law, pardons, ecclesiastical legal affairs, and notarial registration

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为诸省，由中央任命的省长或政治首长监督；省以下有司法区与市镇。地方精英在市政会中影响显著，但中央政府通过省级行政与驻军维持控制。巴斯克与纳瓦拉传统特权在战争背景下成为重大政治争议
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces overseen by centrally appointed civil governors or political chiefs; below them stood judicial districts and municipalities. Local elites exercised strong influence in town councils, but the central government maintained control through provincial administration and garrisons. The traditional fueros of the Basque provinces and Navarre remained major political issues in the wartime context

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为罗马法—卡斯蒂利亚法传统、王室敕令、宪法性文件和近代法典化努力的混合体。1837年宪法提供自由主义框架，但司法实践仍受地区习惯法、教会遗产及紧急军事法令影响
legalSystem.en: The legal system was a mixture of Roman-Castilian legal tradition, royal decrees, constitutional instruments, and modern codification efforts. The Constitution of 1837 provided the liberal framework, but judicial practice was still shaped by regional customary law, ecclesiastical legacies, and emergency military decrees

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以间接税、消费税、海关关税、盐税、印花税及土地和财富相关征收为主。改革旨在建立更统一的近代财政，但征收效率不均、逃税严重，且内战使许多地区税源不稳
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied mainly on indirect taxes, excises, customs duties, salt taxes, stamp duties, and levies tied to land and wealth. Reforms aimed to create a more uniform modern fiscal state, but collection remained uneven, evasion was widespread, and civil war made revenues unstable in many regions

religion.zh: 罗马天主教占绝对主导地位，构成国家认同、教育与社会生活的核心。虽然自由派政府试图削弱教会特权并推进没收教产，但民间宗教实践、修会传统与主教权威仍极具影响力
religion.en: Roman Catholicism overwhelmingly predominated and formed the core of state identity, education, and social life. Although liberal governments sought to curb ecclesiastical privilege and carry out confiscation of church property, popular religious practice, monastic traditions, and episcopal authority remained highly influential

philosophy.zh: 主流思想为天主教保守主义、君主合法性观念与自由主义宪政思想的冲突并存；启蒙遗产、历史法学、温和改革论及民族主权观念在政界和知识界持续交锋
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought was marked by conflict between Catholic conservatism, monarchic legitimism, and liberal constitutionalism; Enlightenment legacies, historical jurisprudence, moderate reformism, and notions of national sovereignty continued to clash in politics and intellectual life

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为拉丁字母，行政、教育与出版普遍使用卡斯蒂利亚西班牙语；加泰罗尼亚语、巴斯克语、加利西亚语等地方语言在民间持续存在，但国家官方书写高度以西班牙语为中心
writingSystem.en: The main writing system was the Latin alphabet, with Castilian Spanish used throughout administration, education, and print; Catalan, Basque, Galician, and other regional languages persisted in everyday use, but official written culture was strongly centered on Spanish

culturalAchievements.zh: 西班牙在文学、绘画、宗教建筑遗产和音乐传统方面底蕴深厚。19世纪前期延续戈雅之后的艺术影响，浪漫主义文学与历史叙事兴起，马德里、塞维利亚与巴塞罗那的剧院、报刊与学会逐步扩展公共文化空间
culturalAchievements.en: Spain possessed deep traditions in literature, painting, religious architectural heritage, and music. The early nineteenth century continued to live under the artistic shadow of Goya, while Romantic literature and historical writing rose in prominence, and theaters, newspapers, and learned societies in Madrid, Seville, and Barcelona gradually expanded the public cultural sphere

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系罗曼语族，以西班牙语为主；巴斯克语为非印欧孤立语言，在北部持续使用
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Indo-European Romance family, with Spanish predominating; Basque, a non-Indo-European language isolate, continued to be spoken in the north

gdpDescription.zh: 1840年的西班牙经济处于农业主导向有限工业化过渡阶段，总体落后于英国与法国，也逊于部分西欧沿海地区。加泰罗尼亚棉纺、巴斯克冶铁和安达卢西亚出口农业具有活力，但国内交通薄弱、资本市场有限、财政动荡与内战破坏了整体增长
gdpDescription.en: In 1840 the Spanish economy was in transition from agrarian predominance to limited industrialization, lagging behind Britain and France and also behind some coastal parts of Western Europe. Catalan cotton textiles, Basque ironworking, and Andalusian export agriculture showed vigor, but weak internal transport, limited capital markets, fiscal instability, and civil war disrupted broader growth

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物与橄榄种植、葡萄酒、羊毛与畜牧、加泰罗尼亚棉纺织、面粉加工、巴斯克铁业、造船、烟草加工、殖民贸易相关港口服务业
mainIndustries.en: Grain and olive cultivation, wine, wool and livestock, Catalan cotton textiles, flour milling, Basque ironworking, shipbuilding, tobacco processing, and port services linked to colonial trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口葡萄酒、雪利酒、橄榄油、羊毛、矿产、汞、柑橘与部分纺织品；进口棉花、机械、煤炭、制成品、殖民商品与金融资本
tradeGoods.en: Exports included wine, sherry, olive oil, wool, minerals, mercury, citrus, and some textiles; imports included raw cotton, machinery, coal, manufactured goods, colonial commodities, and financial capital

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。南部与西部大量农村家庭接近温饱，依赖收成与季节雇工；北部部分小农较稳固；城市中出现小规模工商业中产阶层，而地主、金融家和旧贵族掌握大部分地产与金融资产
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was distributed very unevenly. Many rural families in the south and west lived near subsistence and depended on harvests and seasonal labor; some northern smallholders were more secure; urban centers saw the emergence of a modest commercial and industrial middle class, while landlords, financiers, and the old nobility controlled most land and financial assets

economicSystem.zh: 以私有土地、行会残余、地主经济、港口贸易和逐步扩大的工厂生产并存的混合市场经济。国家通过关税、专卖、债务融资与教产拍卖深度介入，但尚未形成高度一体化的全国市场
economicSystem.en: A mixed market economy combining private landholding, remnants of guild structures, landlord agriculture, port trade, and gradually expanding factory production. The state intervened heavily through tariffs, monopolies, debt finance, and sales of confiscated church lands, yet a highly integrated national market had not yet formed

source.zh: 直接税与土地相关征收

source.en: Sales of confiscated church property and extraordinary levies

category.en: Debt interest and public debt service

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况紧张，现金储备有限，严重依赖短期借款、国债展期与非常收入。长期内战、税收征集困难和信用受损使财政持续脆弱
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was strained, with limited cash reserves and heavy reliance on short-term borrowing, debt rollover, and extraordinary revenues. Prolonged civil war, difficulties in tax collection, and impaired credit left the fiscal system chronically fragile

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以战争融资、债务维持、增税、出售教会财产和加强中央征收能力为核心。政府目标是在压制卡洛斯派后重建信用与统一税制，但现实上仍受派系斗争与地方阻力牵制
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on financing war, maintaining debt payments, raising taxes, selling church property, and strengthening the central collection apparatus. The government aimed to rebuild credit and unify taxation after suppressing the Carlists, but in practice remained constrained by factional conflict and regional resistance

description.zh: 王国军事力量核心，包括线列步兵、轻步兵、骑兵、炮兵、工兵及地方驻防部队。其主要任务是结束第一次卡洛斯战争并维持国内秩序
description.en: The core of the kingdom's military strength, including line infantry, light infantry, cavalry, artillery, engineers, and garrison troops. Its main task was to conclude the First Carlist War and maintain internal order

description.zh: 规模较18世纪显著衰退，但仍维持若干风帆主力舰、护卫舰、巡逻舰与海军陆战力量，用于保护本土海岸、巴利阿里群岛及加勒比与菲律宾航线
description.en: Much diminished from its eighteenth-century scale, but still maintained a number of sailing ships-of-the-line, frigates, patrol craft, and marine forces to protect home coasts, the Balearics, and routes to the Caribbean and the Philippines

description.zh: 由自由派政权偏重使用的城市与地方武装，用于守备、治安与政治动员，在政局动荡中兼具军事和党派色彩
description.en: Urban and local armed formations favored by liberal governments, used for garrison duty, policing, and political mobilization, with both military and partisan significance during instability

commanderInChief.zh: 伊莎贝拉二世女王（名义统帅）；实际最高军事权威由摄政政府与巴尔多梅罗·埃斯帕特罗将军主导
commanderInChief.en: Queen Isabella II (nominal commander-in-chief); actual supreme military authority was exercised by the regency government and General Baldomero Espartero

technology.zh: 军队处于火帽枪与旧式燧发枪并存阶段，主力仍以滑膛火器和拿破仑时代战术传统为基础。炮兵与工兵具一定专业能力，但兵站、训练、军服供给和标准化程度不足，海军仍以风帆战舰为主，蒸汽化刚起步
technology.en: The armed forces were in a transitional phase with percussion firearms appearing alongside older flintlocks, while the main force still relied on smoothbore weapons and Napoleonic tactical traditions. Artillery and engineers possessed some professional strength, but logistics, training, uniforms, and standardization were inadequate, and the navy remained primarily sail-based with steam adoption only beginning

threats.zh: 首要威胁是国内卡洛斯派残余、地方叛乱与军人干政。对外方面，法国与英国既是影响者也是潜在压力来源；北非沿岸海盗余波、殖民防务及海上交通安全亦构成次要挑战
threats.en: The foremost threats were domestic Carlist remnants, regional unrest, and military intervention in politics. Externally, France and Britain were both influential powers and potential sources of pressure; lingering North African maritime insecurity, colonial defense, and protection of sea communications posed secondary challenges

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千二百万，主要集中于卡斯蒂利亚、安达卢西亚、加泰罗尼亚、瓦伦西亚和加利西亚等地区。人口增长缓慢，受战争、疾病、粮食波动和地区经济差异影响显著
populationDescription.en: The population stood at about 12 million, concentrated mainly in Castile, Andalusia, Catalonia, Valencia, and Galicia. Population growth was modest and strongly affected by war, disease, fluctuations in food supply, and regional economic disparities

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括王室、贵族、大地主、高级军官、金融家及高阶教士；中层包括商人、专业人士、军官、地主农民、工场主与公务人员；下层由佃农、小农、农业雇工、城市工匠、纺织工人与贫民构成。地区差异明显，加泰罗尼亚工人阶层和南部无地农工问题尤为突出
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the royal family, nobility, large landowners, senior officers, financiers, and higher clergy; the middle strata included merchants, professionals, officers, peasant proprietors, workshop owners, and civil servants; the lower strata consisted of tenants, small farmers, agricultural laborers, urban artisans, textile workers, and the poor. Regional contrasts were marked, especially the industrial working class in Catalonia and the landless rural labor problem in the south

allies.zh: 主要依赖与英国、法国及葡萄牙的自由主义合作框架，尤其在1834年四国同盟之后获得对伊莎贝拉派的外交支持
allies.en: Spain relied chiefly on a liberal cooperative framework with Britain, France, and Portugal, especially receiving diplomatic support for the Isabelline cause after the Quadruple Alliance of 1834

enemies.zh: 正式对外敌国有限，但国内卡洛斯派及其海外同情者是主要敌对力量；摩洛哥与北非局势偶尔带来边海压力
enemies.en: There were few formal foreign enemies, but the Carlists and their sympathizers abroad were the principal hostile force; Morocco and instability along the North African littoral occasionally created coastal pressure

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以争取列强承认伊莎贝拉王位、稳定与法英关系、维护残余海外殖民地、避免卷入大规模欧洲战争为主。西班牙已不再是主导欧洲秩序的强权，更重视政权合法性、海上交通与有限的地中海及大西洋利益
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on securing great-power recognition for Isabella's throne, stabilizing relations with France and Britain, preserving the remaining overseas colonies, and avoiding involvement in major European wars. Spain was no longer a leading shaper of European order and instead prioritized regime legitimacy, maritime communications, and limited Mediterranean and Atlantic interests

keyInnovations.zh: 加泰罗尼亚机械化棉纺、蒸汽动力在纺织与采矿中的初步应用、改良冶铁技术、现代印刷出版扩展、电报尚未普及、铁路建设仍处筹备阶段。整体技术扩散区域不均，工业技术集中于少数沿海与北方地区
keyInnovations.en: Key developments included mechanized cotton spinning in Catalonia, early use of steam power in textiles and mining, improved ironworking techniques, and the expansion of modern print culture, while the telegraph was not yet widespread and railway construction remained in the preparatory stage. Technological diffusion was uneven overall, with industrial techniques concentrated in a few coastal and northern regions

strengths.zh: 西班牙拥有重要港口、广阔农业腹地、深厚国家传统、较大人口规模以及加泰罗尼亚和巴斯克等具工业潜力的区域。卡洛斯战争接近尾声后，国家有机会在自由主义框架下重整财政、军队与行政
strengths.en: Spain possessed important ports, a broad agricultural hinterland, deep state traditions, a substantial population, and regions with industrial potential such as Catalonia and the Basque country. With the Carlist War nearing its end, the state had an opportunity to reorganize finance, the military, and administration within a liberal framework

weaknesses.zh: 政治派系严重分裂，摄政危机频发，军队深度介入政治，财政赤字和债务沉重，交通落后，地区认同与特权问题尖锐，教会财产改革造成长期社会对立。经济现代化缺乏全国统一基础
weaknesses.en: Political factions were deeply divided, regency crises were frequent, the military intervened heavily in politics, fiscal deficits and debt were burdensome, transport remained backward, regional identities and privileges generated sharp tensions, and church property reforms created lasting social conflict. Economic modernization lacked a unified national foundation

outlook.zh: 1840年的西班牙处在决定性转折点。若中央政府能在战后稳定摄政、整顿财政并缓和军政与地区矛盾，王国有望逐步走向温和工业化与制度巩固；若派系斗争延续，则政变、起义与财政危机仍将反复出现
outlook.en: Spain in 1840 stood at a decisive turning point. If the central government could stabilize the regency after the war, repair the finances, and ease military-political and regional tensions, the kingdom might gradually move toward moderate industrialization and institutional consolidation; if factional struggle continued, coups, uprisings, and fiscal crises would likely recur

description.zh: 经历卡洛斯战争后的伊比利亚王国，国内政治仍然高度动荡。
description.en: An Iberian kingdom emerging from the Carlist Wars, with domestic politics still highly unstable.

name.zh: 大不列颠及爱尔兰联合王国
name.en: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制下的议会国家，以王室、内阁和议会共同运作，实际行政权日益集中于对下议院负责的首相与内阁。
governmentForm.en: A constitutional monarchy and parliamentary state in which Crown, cabinet, and Parliament jointly operated, with effective executive authority increasingly centered in the prime minister and cabinet responsible to the House of Commons.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由贵族与地主阶层、工商业中产阶级、城市工人阶级、农业佃农与雇工构成；苏格兰、英格兰、威尔士与爱尔兰之间存在明显地区差异，工业化加速了阶级重组与城市贫困。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of aristocracy and landed elites, a growing commercial and industrial middle class, urban working classes, and agricultural tenants and laborers; marked regional differences existed among England, Scotland, Wales, and Ireland, while industrialization accelerated class restructuring and urban poverty.

rulingClass.zh: 执政核心为王室、世袭贵族、高级地主、辉格与托利两大政治精英、金融资本家以及帝国行政高层。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class was centered on the Crown, hereditary aristocracy, major landowners, Whig and Tory political elites, financial capitalists, and the upper ranks of imperial administration.

succession.zh: 依王位世袭继承，并受1689年《权利法案》、1701年《王位继承法》等宪制传统规范，优先按新教王室血统继承。
succession.en: Succession followed hereditary monarchy, regulated by constitutional tradition including the Bill of Rights of 1689 and the Act of Settlement of 1701, with priority given to Protestant dynastic descent.

structure.zh: 国家权力由君主、内阁、上议院和下议院构成。1840年时首相为墨尔本勋爵，政府依赖下议院支持施政。中央政府通过各部会、财政机关、海军与陆军体系以及殖民行政网络统治联合王国本土并协调帝国事务。
structure.en: State power was structured around the monarch, cabinet, House of Lords, and House of Commons. In 1840 the prime minister was Lord Melbourne, and the government depended on support in the Commons. The central government ruled the United Kingdom through departments, fiscal offices, naval and military systems, and a colonial administrative network coordinating imperial affairs.

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税收统筹、债务管理、财政拨款与总体经济行政监督。
function.en: Managed the national budget, coordinated taxation, supervised public debt, controlled appropriations, and oversaw general fiscal administration.

function.zh: 主管国内治安、警务协调、监狱、社会秩序和部分爱尔兰及地方行政事务。
function.en: Handled domestic security, police coordination, prisons, public order, and certain Irish and local administrative matters.

function.zh: 负责对欧陆列强与全球国家的外交关系、条约谈判与使节体系。
function.en: Directed diplomatic relations with European powers and states worldwide, including treaties and the diplomatic service.

function.zh: 管理王室直属殖民地、总督任命、殖民政策与跨洋行政协调。
function.en: Administered Crown colonies, oversaw governor appointments, colonial policy, and transoceanic administrative coordination.

function.zh: 负责陆军人事、军需、军费与本土及海外陆军部署行政。
function.en: Managed army personnel, logistics, military finance, and administrative deployment of land forces at home and overseas.

function.zh: 统辖皇家海军舰队建造、补给、军官任命、海军战略与海外制海权执行。
function.en: Directed the Royal Navy’s shipbuilding, supply, officer appointments, naval strategy, and execution of maritime supremacy overseas.

function.zh: 征收关税、消费税和港口税，是国家收入的关键来源之一。
function.en: Collected customs duties, excise taxes, and port-related charges, forming one of the key pillars of state revenue.

function.zh: 负责全国邮政、官方通信与不断扩大的信息传递网络。
function.en: Operated national postal services, official communications, and an expanding information network.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依赖郡、教区、市镇法人机构和治安法官体系。1835年《市政公司法》后，许多城镇行政逐渐现代化；1834年《济贫法修正案》又通过济贫法联合会强化基层社会管理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on counties, parishes, municipal corporations, and the magistracy. After the Municipal Corporations Act of 1835 many boroughs were gradually modernized, while the Poor Law Amendment Act of 1834 strengthened grassroots social administration through Poor Law unions.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以普通法为基础，辅以衡平法、成文法和议会立法。英格兰与威尔士、苏格兰、爱尔兰各有法制差异；司法独立较强，但选举制度与社会权利仍受财产资格限制。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on common law, supplemented by equity, statute law, and parliamentary legislation. England and Wales, Scotland, and Ireland retained legal distinctions; judicial independence was comparatively strong, though electoral participation and civil rights were still constrained by property qualifications.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自关税、消费税、印花税、邮政收入及土地和所得相关税收。1840年所得税尚未恢复，国家财政高度依赖贸易税和消费课税，这使自由贸易改革成为激烈政治议题。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from customs duties, excise, stamp duties, postal receipts, and land- or income-related assessments. Income tax had not yet been restored in 1840, so the state depended heavily on trade and consumption taxes, making free-trade reform a major political issue.

religion.zh: 以新教基督教为主，英格兰国教会居核心地位；苏格兰长老会、卫理宗、浸礼会、天主教和其他非国教派别广泛存在。宗教既塑造社会道德，也与教育、慈善、政治改革和帝国传教事业紧密相连。
religion.en: Predominantly Protestant Christian, with the Church of England at the center; Scottish Presbyterianism, Methodism, Baptists, Catholicism, and other Nonconformist traditions were also widespread. Religion shaped social morality and was closely tied to education, charity, political reform, and imperial missionary enterprise.

philosophy.zh: 主流思想包括宪政主义、经验主义、功利主义、古典自由主义与福音派道德改革观念。亚当·斯密以来的政治经济学、边沁与詹姆斯·密尔的功利主义、以及保守主义的有机社会观共同影响施政与公共讨论。
philosophy.en: Dominant currents included constitutionalism, empiricism, utilitarianism, classical liberalism, and evangelical moral reform. Political economy after Adam Smith, the utilitarianism of Bentham and James Mill, and conservative organic views of society all influenced policy and public debate.

writingSystem.zh: 采用拉丁字母书写系统，标准书面英语占主导地位，同时在苏格兰、威尔士和爱尔兰仍存在地方语言书写传统。
writingSystem.en: Used the Latin alphabet, with standard written English dominant, while Scottish, Welsh, and Irish local literary traditions persisted.

culturalAchievements.zh: 英国在1840年前后处于维多利亚早期文化上升期，成就涵盖浪漫主义与现实主义文学、报刊出版、铁路与工业建筑、自然科学、政治经济学、公共博物馆与博览展示文化。狄更斯、拜伦之后的文学影响巨大，皇家学会与伦敦学术机构推动科学声望，工业城市与帝国港口塑造了新的大众文化与消费社会。
culturalAchievements.en: Britain around 1840 stood in an early Victorian cultural ascent, with achievements in Romantic and emerging realist literature, newspapers and publishing, railway and industrial architecture, natural science, political economy, and the culture of public museums and exhibitions. Writers from the age of Dickens and post-Byronic literature had major influence, while the Royal Society and London’s learned institutions advanced scientific prestige; industrial cities and imperial ports shaped a new mass culture and consumer society.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系日耳曼语族，以英语为主，威尔士语、苏格兰盖尔语和爱尔兰语等凯尔特语言仍有区域分布。
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Indo-European Germanic family, namely English, while Celtic languages such as Welsh, Scottish Gaelic, and Irish remained regionally present.

gdpDescription.zh: 英国本土在1840年是世界上工业化程度最高的大型经济体，也是全球金融、航运、保险、机械制造与煤铁生产中心之一。其国民产出高度商品化，农业在总产值中的比重持续下降，而纺织、煤炭、冶铁、造船、铁路和贸易服务迅速扩张。若按当时实际购买力衡量，其经济规模居世界前列，且人均收入明显高于多数欧亚国家。
gdpDescription.en: In 1840 Britain was the most industrialized large economy in the world and one of the chief global centers of finance, shipping, insurance, machine production, and coal and iron output. Its national product was highly monetized; agriculture’s share continued to decline while textiles, coal, ironmaking, shipbuilding, railways, and trade services expanded rapidly. By contemporary purchasing power it ranked among the world’s leading economies, with per-capita income distinctly above that of most Eurasian states.

mainIndustries.zh: 棉纺织、毛纺织、煤炭开采、铁与钢前身冶炼、蒸汽机械制造、造船、铁路建设、金融保险、港口贸易、陶瓷、印刷出版与高价值手工业。
mainIndustries.en: Cotton textiles, woolens, coal mining, iron smelting and early steel-related metallurgy, steam machinery, shipbuilding, railway construction, finance and insurance, port commerce, ceramics, printing and publishing, and high-value crafts.

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口棉纱、棉布、毛织品、铁制品、机械、五金、煤炭与金融服务；主要进口原棉、木材、粮食、糖、茶、咖啡、染料、丝绸及帝国与海外殖民地物产。
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included cotton yarn, cotton cloth, woolens, iron goods, machinery, hardware, coal, and financial services; major imports included raw cotton, timber, grain, sugar, tea, coffee, dyes, silk, and products from the empire and overseas regions.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距极大。地主与金融家拥有土地、国债、股份和城市地产，工业中产阶级积累迅速；但工人家庭多依赖周薪，缺乏储蓄，易受失业、物价和疾病冲击。爱尔兰与英国工业区贫困问题尤为突出。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was extremely unequal. Landowners and financiers held land, government securities, shares, and urban property, while the industrial middle classes accumulated wealth rapidly; however, many working-class households lived on weekly wages with little savings and were vulnerable to unemployment, prices, and disease. Poverty was particularly acute in Ireland and in British industrial districts.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场资本主义和工业资本主义为核心，辅以帝国贸易网络、中央银行信用、股份公司、国债市场和海上霸权。国家虽仍保留关税与谷物法等保护性制度，但整体政策方向正转向自由贸易和金融整合。
economicSystem.en: The economy was based on market and industrial capitalism, supported by imperial trade networks, central-bank credit, joint-stock enterprise, the public debt market, and maritime supremacy. Although tariffs and protective institutions such as the Corn Laws still remained, policy was moving increasingly toward free trade and financial integration.

category.en: Poor relief, justice, and public services

treasuryDescription.zh: 英国财政信誉建立在长期税收能力、海关体系、英格兰银行信用和庞大的国债市场之上。虽然年度预算常受经济波动与军事支出影响，但其借贷能力远超大多数同时代国家。
treasuryDescription.en: British fiscal credibility rested on long-term taxing capacity, the customs system, Bank of England credit, and a vast market for government debt. Although annual budgets were affected by economic fluctuations and military spending, its borrowing capacity far surpassed that of most contemporary states.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策目标是在维持金本位信誉、偿付国债、支持海军与帝国防务的同时，逐步简化税制并刺激贸易。1840年前后围绕削减关税、扩大商业流通和缓解财政赤字的讨论日趋激烈。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy aimed to preserve confidence in the gold standard, service the national debt, and support the navy and imperial defense while gradually simplifying taxation and stimulating trade. By 1840 debate was intensifying over tariff reduction, expanded commerce, and relief of the budget deficit.

description.zh: 世界最强海军，维持全球制海权、护航贸易、封锁敌国港口并为帝国扩张提供远洋打击能力。1840年正执行对华远征与多海域巡航任务，蒸汽舰与传统风帆战舰并用。
description.en: The world’s strongest navy, maintaining global maritime supremacy, protecting trade, blockading enemy ports, and providing long-range force for imperial expansion. In 1840 it was engaged in the expedition against China and in patrols across multiple seas, using both steam vessels and traditional sailing warships.

description.zh: 包括步兵、骑兵、炮兵与工兵，承担本土驻防、爱尔兰秩序维持和海外殖民地作战任务。其规模不如欧陆大国征兵军，但训练、纪律和海外投送能力突出。
description.en: Included infantry, cavalry, artillery, and engineers, serving in home garrisons, maintaining order in Ireland, and fighting in overseas colonies. It was smaller than the mass conscript armies of continental powers, but notable for training, discipline, and overseas deployability.

description.zh: 由地方民兵、约曼骑兵和各类辅助防御部队组成，主要负责本土防务、治安支援与战时补充。
description.en: Comprised local militia, yeomanry cavalry, and assorted auxiliary defense bodies, mainly intended for homeland defense, public-order support, and wartime reinforcement.

commanderInChief.zh: 维多利亚女王（名义统帅）；政府由首相墨尔本勋爵领导，海军事务由海军部负责
commanderInChief.en: Queen Victoria (nominal commander-in-chief); the government was led by Prime Minister Lord Melbourne, while naval affairs were directed by the Admiralty

technology.zh: 军队处于火枪—火炮时代向蒸汽与工业后勤时代过渡阶段。陆军装备燧发枪与滑膛炮为主，海军则在木制风帆战列舰基础上逐步引入蒸汽推进舰、爆破炮弹舰和更成熟的全球补给体系。英国在船坞、火炮铸造、海图测绘和海军后勤方面领先。
technology.en: The military stood in transition from the musket-and-cannon age to one of steam power and industrial logistics. The army still relied mainly on flintlock muskets and smoothbore artillery, while the navy was gradually introducing steam propulsion, shell-firing vessels, and a more mature global supply system atop its wooden sailing battle fleet. Britain led in dockyards, artillery casting, charting, and naval logistics.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与法国、俄罗斯等列强的全球战略竞争，爱尔兰内部不稳，殖民地与海上交通线广泛分散，以及在亚洲对清朝、阿富汗和印度边疆事务的军事介入。1840年对华战争标志着其海军力量被用于强制打开东亚贸易。
threats.en: Principal threats came from global strategic rivalry with powers such as France and Russia, instability in Ireland, the wide dispersion of colonies and sea lanes, and military involvement in China, Afghanistan, and the Indian frontier. The war against Qing China in 1840 marked the use of British naval force to compel access to East Asian trade.

populationDescription.zh: 1840年联合王国人口约2800万，英格兰占多数，苏格兰、威尔士和爱尔兰构成重要区域部分。人口增长迅速，死亡率虽有所下降，但城市卫生条件恶劣。工业化推动了从乡村到工矿城市的大规模迁移。
populationDescription.en: The United Kingdom had about 28 million people in 1840, with England forming the majority and Scotland, Wales, and Ireland making up important regional components. Population growth was rapid; mortality had somewhat declined, but urban sanitary conditions remained poor. Industrialization drove large-scale migration from the countryside to mining and factory towns.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括世袭贵族与大地主、绅士与专业人士、中产工商业者、小店主与手工业者、工厂工人与矿工、农业雇工与佃农，以及数量庞大的城市贫民。爱尔兰农民与英国北部工人阶级在经济波动中最脆弱。
socialClasses.en: The major social classes included hereditary aristocrats and great landlords, gentry and professionals, middle-class industrial and commercial groups, small shopkeepers and artisans, factory workers and miners, agricultural laborers and tenants, and a large urban poor population. Irish peasants and the working classes of northern Britain were among the most vulnerable in periods of economic strain.

allies.zh: 英国在1840年没有严格意义上的固定大陆同盟，但与葡萄牙保持长期友好关系，并在欧洲均势中与奥地利等保守列强维持合作空间；在帝国体系内则依赖东印度公司政权、殖民地政府和海上补给站形成准同盟网络。
allies.en: Britain had no rigid continental alliance in 1840, but maintained long-standing friendship with Portugal and retained room for cooperation with conservative powers such as Austria in the European balance; within the imperial sphere it relied on East India Company rule, colonial governments, and a network of maritime bases that functioned as quasi-allied structures.

enemies.zh: 没有单一正式的全面战争敌国，但与清朝已进入第一次鸦片战争状态，并与法国、俄罗斯在全球殖民和地缘战略上保持长期竞争；在中亚与近东问题上也警惕波斯和阿富汗局势牵动对俄博弈。
enemies.en: Britain had no single formal total-war enemy, but had entered the First Opium War against Qing China and remained in long-term global strategic rivalry with France and Russia; in Central Asian and Near Eastern affairs it also watched developments in Persia and Afghanistan as part of the wider contest with Russia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策目标是维护欧洲均势、确保海上霸权、保护通往印度的交通线、扩大自由贸易与商业准入，并通过炮舰外交、条约体系和金融影响力塑造全球秩序。1840年对清开战正体现其以海军与商业利益结合的帝国政策。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy sought to preserve the European balance of power, secure maritime supremacy, protect routes to India, expand free trade and commercial access, and shape global order through gunboat diplomacy, treaty systems, and financial influence. The 1840 war against Qing China exemplified its imperial policy of combining naval force with commercial interests.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键创新包括高压与改良蒸汽机、机械纺织、焦炭炼铁、铁路机车、电报的早期实用化、现代船坞工程、精密机床与大规模煤炭采掘。英国在铁路建设、蒸汽航运、工厂制度、金融票据与海军后勤技术方面处于世界领先地位。
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations included high-pressure and improved steam engines, mechanized textile production, coke-fueled iron smelting, railway locomotion, early practical telegraphy, modern dock engineering, precision machine tools, and large-scale coal extraction. Britain stood at the world forefront in railway building, steam navigation, factory organization, financial paper instruments, and naval logistical technology.

strengths.zh: 最大优势在于全球最强海军、工业生产力、金融信用、商船网络、煤铁资源、成熟的议会制度以及对世界市场的控制力。伦敦是国际金融与保险中心，英国本土又拥有高识字率、工程人才和巨大的帝国资源汲取能力。
strengths.en: Its greatest strengths were the world’s strongest navy, industrial productivity, financial credit, merchant shipping networks, coal and iron resources, a mature parliamentary system, and powerful command over world markets. London was an international center of finance and insurance, while the metropole possessed relatively high literacy, engineering talent, and immense capacity to draw resources from the empire.

weaknesses.zh: 主要弱点包括严重的阶级贫富分化、工人贫困与城市公共卫生危机、爱尔兰问题、对海外原料和贸易航线的依赖，以及旧式选举制度和谷物法引发的政治紧张。陆军规模相对有限，难以像欧陆征兵国家那样进行大规模陆战。
weaknesses.en: Its principal weaknesses included severe class inequality, working-class poverty and urban public-health crises, the Irish question, dependence on overseas raw materials and trade routes, and political tensions generated by the old electoral system and the Corn Laws. Its army was relatively limited in scale and could not wage continental mass warfare like the conscript states of Europe.

outlook.zh: 1840年的英国前景总体极为强劲。若能继续推动财政改革、贸易自由化、铁路扩张与海军现代化，其在未来数十年很可能巩固世界工商业与海洋霸权。但社会改革若滞后，工人运动、爱尔兰危机与帝国过度扩张也可能构成长期隐患。
outlook.en: Britain’s outlook in 1840 was broadly very strong. If it continued fiscal reform, trade liberalization, railway expansion, and naval modernization, it was likely to consolidate world industrial, commercial, and maritime supremacy over the coming decades. Yet if social reform lagged, labor unrest, Irish crises, and imperial overextension could become serious long-term liabilities.

description.zh: 工业革命核心国家与全球海上帝国中枢，1840年对清朝发动鸦片战争。
description.en: The core state of the Industrial Revolution and center of a global maritime empire, launching the Opium War against Qing China in 1840.

governmentForm.zh: 由教宗直接统治的天主教神权君主制国家，兼具教会法与世俗行政机构。
governmentForm.en: A Catholic theocratic monarchy ruled directly by the Pope, combining canon law with secular administrative institutions.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以教士、贵族、城市中产与手工业者、农民和佃户为主，地方社会仍深受教会、地主与传统行会影响。
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around clergy, nobility, urban middle groups and artisans, and peasants and tenant farmers, with local life heavily shaped by the Church, landlords, and traditional guilds.

rulingClass.zh: 枢机主教、高级教士、教廷官僚及与教廷关系密切的地方贵族构成统治阶层。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of cardinals, senior clergy, papal bureaucrats, and local nobles closely tied to the papal regime.

succession.zh: 教宗由枢机主教团选举产生，并非世袭；教皇国的最高统治权随新教宗即位而转移。
succession.en: The Pope was elected by the College of Cardinals rather than by hereditary succession; supreme authority in the Papal States passed to each newly elected pontiff.

structure.zh: 中央政府以教廷为核心，最高权力属于教宗。国务枢机卿主持日常政务，罗马各部会与各地宗座代表、使节和地方长官共同维持统治。国家按使节辖区和地方代表区划管理，兼有教会司法与世俗司法。
structure.en: The central government was centered on the Roman Curia, with supreme authority vested in the Pope. Day-to-day administration was overseen by the Cardinal Secretary of State, while Roman congregations, papal delegates, legates, and local governors sustained rule. The state was administered through legations and delegations, with both ecclesiastical and secular jurisdictions.

function.zh: 协调内政、外交、教廷文书与中央行政，是教宗政务中枢。
function.en: Coordinated internal affairs, diplomacy, papal correspondence, and central administration; it was the main nerve center of papal government.

function.zh: 管理国家财政、税收、国有财产与部分公共债务事务。
function.en: Managed state finances, taxation, public property, and aspects of public debt.

name.zh: 圣咨院与行政司法机构

function.zh: 处理行政争议、地方治理监督及部分高级司法事务。
function.en: Handled administrative disputes, supervision of provincial government, and certain higher judicial matters.

function.zh: 负责城市治安、政治监视、边境检查和秘密警察活动。
function.en: Oversaw urban policing, political surveillance, border inspection, and secret police activities.

function.zh: 维护道路、桥梁、河道、港口和部分公共建筑。
function.en: Maintained roads, bridges, waterways, ports, and certain public buildings.

function.zh: 监督粮食供应、市场秩序、度量衡及部分行业监管。
function.en: Supervised grain supply, market order, weights and measures, and regulation of certain trades.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政划分为若干使节区与代表区，由教宗任命的红衣主教使节、宗座代表或地方长官管理，下辖市镇议会与教区网络。地方自治存在，但受中央严格约束。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into legations and delegations, governed by papal appointees such as cardinal legates, apostolic delegates, or provincial governors, beneath whom stood municipal councils and parish networks. Local autonomy existed but was tightly constrained by the center.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合教会法、教宗敕令、罗马法传统与地方习惯法。刑事与政治案件常由特别法庭或行政机关处理，言论与结社自由受到严格限制。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined canon law, papal decrees, Roman-law traditions, and local customary law. Criminal and political cases were often handled by special tribunals or administrative authorities, while freedoms of speech and association were tightly restricted.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制包括土地税、消费税、关税、印花与登记税、盐与烟草等专卖收入，以及国有地产和教会相关收益。税收效率因地方差异和行政保守而有限。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation included land taxes, excise duties, customs, stamp and registration taxes, monopoly revenues from salt and tobacco, and income from state lands and church-related assets. Fiscal efficiency was limited by regional variation and administrative conservatism.

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为国教并支配公共生活。教皇国既是世俗国家，也是全球天主教会的中心，朝圣、礼仪、修会和神职教育极为重要。
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was the state religion and dominated public life. The Papal States were both a temporal state and the center of the global Catholic Church, making pilgrimage, liturgy, religious orders, and clerical education highly important.

philosophy.zh: 官方思想强调反革命保守主义、教权至上、经院哲学传统与对启蒙自由主义的警惕，同时保留一定的人文主义与古典学术传统。
philosophy.en: Official thought emphasized counter-revolutionary conservatism, papal authority, scholastic traditions, and suspicion of Enlightenment liberalism, while also preserving elements of humanism and classical scholarship.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母书写意大利语；拉丁语在教会礼仪、教廷文书和高等教会教育中仍具重要地位。
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used mainly for Italian; Latin still retained major importance in liturgy, curial documentation, and higher ecclesiastical education.

culturalAchievements.zh: 罗马作为天主教艺术与古典遗产中心，拥有圣伯多禄大殿、梵蒂冈图书馆、博物馆收藏、宗教音乐传统及考古研究。教皇国在建筑修缮、宗教艺术赞助和古罗马遗迹保护方面持续活跃。
culturalAchievements.en: Rome, as a center of Catholic art and classical heritage, possessed St. Peter's Basilica, the Vatican Library, major museum collections, sacred music traditions, and archaeological scholarship. The Papal States remained active in architectural restoration, patronage of religious art, and preservation of ancient Roman remains.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系罗曼语族，以意大利语及各地方意大利方言为主，教会和学术领域广泛使用拉丁语。
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Indo-European Romance family, especially Italian and regional Italian dialects, while Latin was widely used in ecclesiastical and scholarly settings.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业为主，城市手工业、宗教服务业和区域贸易提供补充。与西北欧工业化国家相比，教皇国经济结构较为传统，制造业规模有限，基础设施发展缓慢，但罗马和博洛尼亚等城市仍具行政、宗教和市场中心地位。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was predominantly agrarian, supplemented by urban handicrafts, religious services, and regional trade. Compared with the industrializing states of northwestern Europe, the Papal States retained a more traditional economic structure, with limited manufacturing and slow infrastructural development, though cities such as Rome and Bologna remained important administrative, religious, and market centers.

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食种植、葡萄酒、橄榄油、牧业、丝织与毛织、小型金属加工、陶器、纸张、建筑、宗教用品制作与朝圣相关服务业。
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, wine, olive oil, livestock raising, silk and wool textiles, small-scale metalworking, pottery, paper, construction, manufacture of religious goods, and pilgrimage-related services.

tradeGoods.zh: 出口谷物、麻、葡萄酒、橄榄油、丝绸、羊毛制品和部分手工业品；进口煤炭、铁器、机械制品、棉纺品、殖民地商品和奢侈品。
tradeGoods.en: Exports included grain, hemp, wine, olive oil, silk, woolens, and some craft goods; imports included coal, iron goods, machinery, cotton textiles, colonial commodities, and luxury products.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距明显。地主、教士机构和城市贵族拥有大量土地与不动产；普通农户多为小农、佃农或雇农，资产有限，易受歉收和税负影响。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Landlords, ecclesiastical institutions, and urban nobles held substantial landed and real estate assets, while ordinary rural households were often smallholders, tenants, or laborers with limited reserves and vulnerability to bad harvests and taxation.

economicSystem.zh: 以传统农业和地方市场为基础的受管制混合经济，国家在专卖、关税、粮食供应和城市治安中扮演重要角色，商业政策总体偏保守。
economicSystem.en: A regulated mixed economy based on traditional agriculture and local markets, with the state playing an important role in monopolies, customs, grain provisioning, and urban order; commercial policy was generally conservative.

source.en: Monopoly revenues from salt, tobacco, and similar goods

source.zh: 国有地产、手续费与其他收入
source.en: State lands, fees, and other income

category.zh: 宫廷、宗教机构与教育支持
category.en: Court, religious institutions, and educational support

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库维持中等稳健水平，足以支持日常行政、治安与有限公共工程，但面对战争、革命或大规模改革时缓冲能力不足。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was maintained at a moderately sound level, sufficient for routine administration, policing, and limited public works, but inadequate as a deep reserve against war, revolution, or large-scale reform.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重视收支平衡、维持信用与避免激进改革，倾向通过间接税和专卖制度增加收入，而非大规模推动现代化投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized balanced accounts, preservation of credit, and avoidance of radical reform, tending to raise revenue through indirect taxes and monopolies rather than through large-scale modernization spending.

description.zh: 军队主体，负责驻防各省、镇压骚乱和维持边境秩序，装备以滑膛燧发枪为主。
description.en: The main body of the army, tasked with provincial garrison duty, suppression of unrest, and maintenance of border order, armed chiefly with smoothbore flintlock muskets.

description.zh: 承担治安、巡逻、缉私、政治监控与道路安全，是教皇国维持稳定的重要力量。
description.en: Responsible for policing, patrols, anti-smuggling work, political surveillance, and road security; they were a crucial force for maintaining internal stability.

description.zh: 用于侦察、传令、护卫和快速镇压地方动乱，规模较小。
description.en: Used for reconnaissance, dispatch riding, escort duties, and rapid suppression of local disturbances; modest in scale.

description.zh: 负责要塞、城防火炮和有限工程事务，火炮数量不多，技术水平中等偏旧。
description.en: Handled fortresses, urban defensive artillery, and limited engineering duties; artillery numbers were small and the technical standard somewhat outdated.

name.en: Noble Guard and Court Guard Units

description.zh: 负责教宗与宫廷仪仗、近卫和首都重点据点防卫，政治象征意义大于野战价值。
description.en: Responsible for papal and court ceremonial, close protection, and defense of key points in the capital, with greater symbolic than field value.

commanderInChief.zh: 教宗额我略十六世（名义上）与国务枢机卿、军政高官共同指挥
commanderInChief.en: Pope Gregory XVI nominally, with practical direction shared by the Cardinal Secretary of State and senior military officials

technology.zh: 军备以拿破仑战争时代遗存体系为主，步兵主要使用燧发枪，炮兵与后勤现代化有限。铁路、电报尚未成为军用骨干，军队更适合治安与内防，而非对抗大国正规军。
technology.en: Military equipment remained largely rooted in systems inherited from the Napoleonic era, with infantry primarily using flintlocks and only limited modernization in artillery and logistics. Railways and telegraphy had not yet become military backbones, and the army was better suited for policing and internal defense than for fighting a major power's regular forces.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自意大利民族主义、秘密社团、自由主义起义与邻近强国在意大利半岛的干涉。外部全面入侵风险在1840年不高，但内部政治动荡隐患持续存在。
threats.en: The principal threats came from Italian nationalism, secret societies, liberal uprisings, and intervention by nearby great powers in the Italian peninsula. The risk of full external invasion was not especially high in 1840, but chronic internal political instability remained a persistent danger.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要分布于农村平原、山麓和小城镇，罗马、博洛尼亚、费拉拉、安科纳等城市为区域中心。人口增长温和，但公共卫生、贫困与农业波动对生活水平影响明显。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in rural plains, foothills, and small towns, with Rome, Bologna, Ferrara, and Ancona serving as regional centers. Population growth was moderate, but public health, poverty, and agricultural fluctuation strongly affected living standards.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为红衣主教、高级教士、贵族与大地主；中间阶层包括律师、医生、商人、店主、教授与熟练工匠；下层由小农、佃农、农业雇工、城市贫民和普通劳工组成。修会、教区与慈善医院在社会救济中作用显著。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of cardinals, senior clergy, nobles, and large landowners; the middle strata included lawyers, physicians, merchants, shopkeepers, professors, and skilled artisans; the lower strata were made up of small peasants, tenants, farm laborers, the urban poor, and ordinary workers. Religious orders, parishes, and charitable hospitals played a prominent role in social relief.

allies.zh: 在政治上通常依赖奥地利帝国的保护，并与法国、西班牙、葡萄牙及其他天主教国家保持重要宗教与外交联系。
allies.en: Politically it commonly relied on the protection of the Austrian Empire and maintained important religious and diplomatic ties with France, Spain, Portugal, and other Catholic states.

enemies.zh: 无固定国家级宿敌，但与意大利自由主义者、民族主义者、烧炭党等革命力量关系敌对，并警惕撒丁王国等意大利改革与统一势力的影响。
enemies.en: It had no fixed state-level archenemy, but stood in hostile opposition to Italian liberals, nationalists, the Carbonari, and similar revolutionary forces, while remaining wary of the influence of reformist and unification-oriented states such as the Kingdom of Sardinia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维护教宗世俗统治、保持意大利现状、依赖保守列强支持并反对革命传播为核心。作为天主教世界中心，教皇国在宗教外交上的影响往往大于其军事力量。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving the Pope's temporal rule, maintaining the Italian status quo, relying on conservative great-power support, and opposing the spread of revolution. As the center of the Catholic world, the Papal States often exerted more influence through religious diplomacy than through military power.

keyInnovations.zh: 教皇国本身并非技术创新前沿，但逐步吸收蒸汽动力、近代印刷、改良道路工程、城市照明、医学与考古学方法。高等学术机构与教会网络支持教育与知识传播，但工业化采纳速度较慢。
keyInnovations.en: The Papal States were not at the technological frontier, but they gradually absorbed steam power, modern printing, improved road engineering, urban lighting, and developments in medicine and archaeology. Higher learning institutions and ecclesiastical networks supported education and the spread of knowledge, though the pace of industrial adoption remained slow.

strengths.zh: 拥有罗马这一宗教与文化中心、深厚的国际天主教影响力、稳定的保守统治结构，以及在外交上可借助奥地利等大国支持。国家财政尚称稳健，内部秩序在1840年总体维持。
strengths.en: Its strengths included Rome as a religious and cultural center, deep influence across the international Catholic world, a stable conservative governing structure, and access to support from great powers such as Austria. State finances were relatively sound, and overall internal order was maintained in 1840.

weaknesses.zh: 经济落后于工业化欧洲，行政保守低效，地方差异大，基础设施薄弱，军队战斗力有限，且对民族主义与自由主义思潮的压制加深了政治脆弱性。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included an economy lagging behind industrializing Europe, conservative and inefficient administration, strong regional disparities, weak infrastructure, limited military effectiveness, and a deepening political fragility caused by repression of nationalism and liberalism.

outlook.zh: 短期内教皇国仍可凭宗教权威、警察体系与奥地利支持维持稳定，但随着1840年代改革压力、民族主义动员与意大利统一运动上升，其长期前景将日益不利。
outlook.en: In the short term, the Papal States could still preserve stability through religious authority, policing, and Austrian support, but as reform pressures, nationalist mobilization, and the movement for Italian unification intensified in the 1840s, its long-term prospects would become increasingly unfavorable.

description.zh: 由教宗直接统治的意大利中部神权国家，是统一前意大利分裂格局的重要一环。
description.en: A central Italian theocratic state ruled directly by the pope, central to the fragmented pre-unification Italian order.

governmentForm.zh: 保守的世袭君主制，带有高度集权的王室官僚体系
governmentForm.en: A conservative hereditary monarchy with a highly centralized royal bureaucratic system

socialStructure.zh: 社会以地主贵族、教士、城市中产阶层、小手工业者与广大农村佃农和农民构成；西西里与意大利南部乡村仍以大地产和地方庇护关系为主。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of landed nobles, clergy, urban middle strata, petty artisans, and a large mass of rural tenants and peasants; Sicily and the southern mainland remained dominated by large estates and local patronage networks.

rulingClass.zh: 王室、宫廷贵族、高级官僚、军官团、地方地主和高阶教士
rulingClass.en: The royal household, court nobility, senior bureaucrats, officer corps, provincial landowners, and high clergy

succession.zh: 波旁王朝男性优先的世袭继承
succession.en: Hereditary dynastic succession under male-preference Bourbon inheritance

structure.zh: 国家由国王直接主导，依靠国务会议、各部大臣、省级总督与地方行政长官治理。1830年代后王权加强，对出版、警务与地方自治实施严格控制。
structure.en: The state was directed personally by the king, relying on a council of state, ministerial departments, provincial intendants, and local administrators. After the 1830s royal authority was strengthened, with tight controls over publishing, policing, and local autonomy.

function.zh: 管理省级行政、警务、公共秩序、卫生和地方政府监督
function.en: Oversaw provincial administration, policing, public order, health matters, and supervision of local government

function.zh: 征税、国库管理、海关、国债和国家预算编制
function.en: Handled taxation, treasury management, customs, public debt, and preparation of the state budget

name.en: Ministry of Justice and Ecclesiastical Affairs

function.zh: 管理法院体系、法典执行、监狱并协调与天主教会的关系
function.en: Managed the court system, execution of the legal codes, prisons, and coordination with the Catholic Church

function.zh: 负责陆军、海军、兵工、征募与防务设施
function.en: Responsible for the army, navy, armaments, recruitment, and defensive installations

function.zh: 处理与欧洲列强、教廷和地中海诸国的外交往来
function.en: Conducted diplomacy with the European great powers, the Papacy, and Mediterranean states

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为大陆部分与西西里部分的省级行政区，由中央任命的省长、总督或意向官主持，下辖区、乡镇和市政机构；实际执行常受地方地主与显贵影响。
localAdmin.en: The kingdom was divided into provincial administrative units in the mainland and Sicily, headed by centrally appointed governors, intendants, or provincial officials, under whom stood districts, communes, and municipal bodies; in practice implementation was often shaped by local landlords and notables.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以拿破仑时期遗留法典和复辟后王室法令相结合，属大陆法传统；政治案件常由特别警务与行政手段介入，司法独立有限。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Napoleonic-era codifications with Restoration royal decrees and belonged to the civil-law tradition; political cases were often influenced by special policing and administrative intervention, limiting judicial independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以土地税、消费税、关税、盐税、印花与各类间接税为主；征收能力在城市和沿海较强，在内陆乡村则因逃税、特权和行政效率不均而受限。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on land taxes, excises, customs duties, salt taxes, stamp duties, and other indirect levies; collection was stronger in cities and coastal zones, but constrained in inland rural areas by evasion, privilege, and uneven administrative efficiency.

religion.zh: 罗马天主教为绝对主导宗教，王权与教会关系紧密；民间信仰、地方圣人崇拜和宗教节庆在城乡生活中极为重要。
religion.en: Roman Catholicism was overwhelmingly dominant, with close ties between crown and Church; popular devotion, local saints’ cults, and religious festivals were central to both urban and rural life.

philosophy.zh: 官方意识形态偏向保守天主教君主主义，强调秩序、宗教与王权合法性；同时城市知识界中存在温和自由主义、法学理性主义和意大利民族观念的潜流。
philosophy.en: Official ideology leaned toward conservative Catholic monarchism, emphasizing order, religion, and royal legitimacy; at the same time, urban intellectual circles contained undercurrents of moderate liberalism, legal rationalism, and Italian national sentiment.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母书写意大利语，行政和教育中以标准化意大利文为主，但日常生活广泛使用那不勒斯语、西西里语及其他地方方言。
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used to write Italian; administration and education favored standardized Italian, but everyday life widely employed Neapolitan, Sicilian, and other regional vernaculars.

culturalAchievements.zh: 那不勒斯在歌剧、音乐、戏剧和城市文化上享有盛名；王国拥有欧洲重要的考古遗址如庞贝和赫库兰尼姆，宫廷建筑、宗教艺术和那不勒斯歌曲传统都颇具影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Naples was renowned for opera, music, theater, and urban culture; the kingdom possessed major European archaeological sites such as Pompeii and Herculaneum, while court architecture, religious art, and the Neapolitan song tradition were all influential.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch

gdpDescription.zh: 王国是意大利诸邦中人口最多的经济体之一，但经济结构仍以农业为主。那不勒斯及周边拥有一定造船、兵工、丝织和食品加工能力，整体工业化程度落后于英国、法国北部和比利时，也逊于意大利北部部分地区。
gdpDescription.en: The kingdom was one of the largest economies among the Italian states by population, but its structure remained predominantly agrarian. Naples and its surroundings had some shipbuilding, armaments, silk, and food-processing capacity, yet overall industrialization lagged behind Britain, northern France, and Belgium, and was also behind parts of northern Italy.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、橄榄油、葡萄酒、柑橘、畜牧、硫磺开采（尤以西西里）、丝织、手工业、造船、兵工、渔业和沿海贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, olive oil, wine, citrus, livestock, sulfur mining (especially in Sicily), silk production, handicrafts, shipbuilding, armaments, fishing, and coastal trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口硫磺、橄榄油、葡萄酒、生丝、柑橘、杏仁、珊瑚和部分农产品；进口煤炭、机械、纺织品、优质制成品、殖民地货物和部分金属制品。
tradeGoods.en: Exports included sulfur, olive oil, wine, raw silk, citrus fruits, almonds, coral, and various agricultural products; imports included coal, machinery, textiles, higher-grade manufactures, colonial goods, and certain metal wares.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。贵族和大地主掌握大量土地与租佃收益，城市商人和专业阶层拥有有限流动资本，而多数农户仅维持低水平生计，易受歉收、债务与地租压力影响。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Nobles and large landowners controlled extensive land and rental income, urban merchants and professionals held limited liquid capital, while most peasant households lived at a low subsistence level and were vulnerable to bad harvests, debt, and rent burdens.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地主制和受国家监管的君主制经济为主，辅以受保护的工场制造业、王家兵工和有限的近代基础设施建设。
economicSystem.en: An agrarian landlord-based economy under a regulated monarchic framework, supplemented by protected manufactures, royal armament works, and limited modern infrastructure development

source.zh: 消费税、盐税和垄断收入
source.en: Excises, salt taxes, and monopoly revenues

source.zh: 印花、司法费用与行政收费
source.en: Stamp duties, judicial fees, and administrative charges

category.zh: 宫廷、教会与象征性支出

treasuryDescription.zh: 1840年前后两西西里王国以财政相对稳健著称，国库存银和贵金属储备在意大利诸邦中较为可观，部分得益于保守支出和较高的间接税收。
treasuryDescription.en: Around 1840 the Two Sicilies was noted for comparatively sound finances, and its treasury held substantial specie reserves by Italian standards, aided in part by conservative spending and strong indirect taxation.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策倾向平衡预算、谨慎举债和维持现金储备，以稳定王权与军警机器；但这种保守作风也限制了大规模工业和教育投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored balanced budgets, cautious borrowing, and the maintenance of cash reserves in order to secure royal authority and the military-police apparatus; however, this conservatism also limited large-scale investment in industry and education.

description.zh: 包括线列步兵、猎兵、骑兵、炮兵、工兵和驻防部队，是维持国内秩序与海峡防务的核心力量。
description.en: Included line infantry, light infantry, cavalry, artillery, engineers, and garrison troops, forming the core force for internal order and defense of the straits.

description.zh: 以地中海沿岸巡防、船队护航、那不勒斯与西西里港口防务为主，拥有风帆军舰并开始有限采用蒸汽舰船。
description.en: Focused on Mediterranean coastal patrols, convoy protection, and defense of Naples and Sicilian ports, using sailing warships while beginning limited adoption of steam vessels.

description.zh: 负责乡村治安、镇压走私、打击土匪与监控政治异议，在王国统治中作用突出。
description.en: Responsible for rural security, suppression of smuggling, anti-bandit operations, and monitoring political dissent, playing a prominent role in the kingdom’s rule.

commanderInChief.zh: 斐迪南二世国王

technology.zh: 军队装备以燧发枪和平滑膛火炮为主，部分单位开始接触蒸汽技术、改良兵工生产和近代海军工艺，但总体仍处于欧洲第二梯队。
technology.en: The forces were equipped mainly with flintlock muskets and smoothbore artillery; some units were beginning to engage with steam technology, improved armament production, and modern naval techniques, but overall they remained in Europe’s second tier.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自国内自由派与秘密社团活动、西西里地方离心倾向、走私与土匪问题，以及在意大利半岛上与撒丁王国、奥地利势力和更广泛民族主义思潮相关的政治不稳定。
threats.en: The principal threats came from domestic liberal and secret-society activity, Sicilian particularism, smuggling and brigandage, and the wider political instability tied to the Kingdom of Sardinia, Austrian influence in Italy, and broader nationalist currents.

populationDescription.zh: 两西西里王国是当时人口最多的意大利国家，人口分布以乡村为主，集中于坎帕尼亚、普利亚、卡拉布里亚和西西里农业地区；高出生率伴随贫困和周期性卫生危机。
populationDescription.en: The Two Sicilies was the most populous Italian state of its time, with a largely rural population concentrated in the agricultural regions of Campania, Apulia, Calabria, and Sicily; high birth rates coexisted with poverty and periodic public-health crises.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、贵族、主教和高官；中间层为律师、商人、医生、军官、教师和较富裕手工业者；底层则是佃农、无地农民、日工、渔民、矿工和城市贫民。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal family, nobility, bishops, and senior officials; the middle strata included lawyers, merchants, doctors, officers, teachers, and better-off artisans; the lower strata were made up of tenants, landless peasants, laborers, fishermen, miners, and the urban poor.

allies.zh: 无正式牢固军事同盟，但通常与奥地利帝国、教廷及其他保守君主制保持友好关系，并与法国、英国维持务实往来。
allies.en: It had no firm formal military alliance, but generally maintained friendly relations with the Austrian Empire, the Papacy, and other conservative monarchies, while also preserving pragmatic ties with France and Britain.

enemies.zh: 1840年并无公开全面战争中的主要敌国，但政府警惕撒丁王国的自由主义影响、流亡革命者网络以及英国对西西里硫磺贸易的压力。
enemies.en: In 1840 it had no principal enemy in open full-scale war, but the government remained wary of the liberal influence of the Kingdom of Sardinia, émigré revolutionary networks, and British pressure over the Sicilian sulfur trade.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护王朝安全、避免革命扩散、平衡英法影响并在意大利问题上坚持主权独立为核心；总体保守谨慎，重视地中海商贸与海峡安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving dynastic security, preventing the spread of revolution, balancing British and French influence, and defending sovereign independence in Italian affairs; it was broadly conservative and cautious, with attention to Mediterranean commerce and control of the straits.

keyInnovations.zh: 王国已开始建设铁路与电报之前的近代交通基础，蒸汽船技术逐步引入，彼得拉尔萨等王家工场显示出有限工业能力；但技术扩散主要集中在首都周边和国家部门。
keyInnovations.en: The kingdom had begun developing modern transport foundations before the wider spread of telegraphy, steamship technology was gradually being introduced, and royal works such as Pietrarsa demonstrated limited industrial capability; however, technological diffusion remained concentrated around the capital and state sectors.

strengths.zh: 人口庞大、农业资源丰富、财政较稳健、首都那不勒斯是欧洲重要大城市之一，海军与地中海区位使其具有潜在战略价值。
strengths.en: Its strengths included a large population, abundant agricultural resources, relatively sound finances, a capital city that was one of Europe’s major urban centers, and a navy and Mediterranean position of potential strategic value.

weaknesses.zh: 工业化不足、文盲率高、土地分配不均、地方主义强、政治压制严重且行政效率不均，难以把人口规模转化为持续的国家力量。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included insufficient industrialization, high illiteracy, unequal land distribution, strong regionalism, severe political repression, and uneven administrative effectiveness, making it difficult to convert demographic size into sustained state power.

outlook.zh: 1840年的王国表面稳定且财政充裕，但其保守统治模式正在积累结构性紧张。若不能推进行政、经济和社会改革，未来十年内很可能在革命浪潮与意大利统一运动中遭遇严峻挑战。
outlook.en: In 1840 the kingdom appeared stable and fiscally well supplied, but its conservative mode of rule was accumulating structural tensions. Without administrative, economic, and social reform, it was likely to face severe challenges within the next decade from revolutionary upheaval and the movement for Italian unification.

description.zh: 统治意大利南部与西西里的保守王国，工业化有限但人口众多。
description.en: A conservative kingdom ruling southern Italy and Sicily, populous but only modestly industrialized.

governmentForm.zh: 君主立宪制王国，依据1848年前的王权主导体制，辅以王室任命的大臣会议与省级行政机构
governmentForm.en: A constitutional-leaning monarchy in practice still dominated by royal authority before 1848, supported by royal ministers and provincial administrative institutions

socialStructure.zh: 社会以贵族、教士、城市资产阶级、手工业者、农民与少量新兴产业工人为主；皮埃蒙特与热那亚城市社会较活跃，撒丁岛农村社会较传统
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around nobles, clergy, urban bourgeoisie, artisans, peasants, and a small but growing industrial workforce; Piedmont and Genoa had more active urban societies, while rural Sardinia remained more traditional

rulingClass.zh: 萨伏依王室、世袭贵族、高级军官、法官、主教与高级文官共同构成统治阶层
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the House of Savoy, hereditary nobles, senior officers, judges, bishops, and high civil officials

succession.zh: 萨利克式王朝世袭继承，由萨伏依家族男性嫡系继承王位
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession under Salic principles, with the throne passing through the legitimate male line of the House of Savoy

structure.zh: 中央政府由国王、国务会议、各部大臣和宫廷机关组成；国土分为大陆本土诸省与撒丁岛辖区，由总督、省长、意向官与市镇当局层层管理
structure.en: The central government was composed of the king, council of state, ministerial departments, and court institutions; the realm was divided into mainland provinces and Sardinian jurisdictions administered through governors, intendants, and municipal authorities

function.zh: 负责地方行政、警务、公共秩序、人口登记与省级监督
function.en: Handled local administration, policing, public order, population registration, and provincial oversight

function.zh: 负责税收、关税、国债、国库与国家审计
function.en: Managed taxation, customs, public debt, the treasury, and state accounts

function.zh: 负责陆军编制、军需、要塞、征兵与军官任命
function.en: Oversaw army organization, logistics, fortresses, conscription, and officer appointments

function.zh: 负责舰队、海港防务、热那亚海军设施与海上运输
function.en: Managed the fleet, port defenses, naval installations at Genoa, and maritime transport

name.en: Ministry of Justice and Ecclesiastical Affairs

function.zh: 负责法院体系、法典实施、监狱与部分教会事务协调
function.en: Supervised the courts, application of law codes, prisons, and coordination of certain ecclesiastical matters

function.zh: 负责对外使节、条约谈判与列强关系，尤其是对奥地利、法国与英国政策
function.en: Conducted diplomacy, treaty negotiations, and relations with the great powers, especially Austria, France, and Britain

name.zh: 公共工程与商业事务署

function.zh: 负责道路、桥梁、港口、部分工业扶持与商业监管
function.en: Oversaw roads, bridges, ports, limited industrial promotion, and commercial regulation

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以省、区、市镇为层级，省长和意向官由中央任命，市镇议事机构在地方事务上有一定作用，但受王权严格监督
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized into provinces, districts, and communes; governors and intendants were appointed by the center, while municipal councils played a limited role in local affairs under close royal supervision

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以成文法与王室敕令为基础，受到拿破仑时期法制遗产影响，但保留萨伏依旧制与教会法因素；高等法院设于都灵等重要城市
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on written law and royal decrees, influenced by Napoleonic legal legacies while retaining older Savoyard and ecclesiastical elements; higher courts sat in Turin and other major cities

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自地税、消费税、盐税、印花税、关税与国有财产收益；大陆地区税收征管较有效，撒丁岛征收效率较低
